Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** Catherine Lelay. Sep. 2015 *)

Unset Kernel Term Sharing.

Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.PartA.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Sets.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Orders.

Require Import UniMath.RealNumbers.Sets.
Require Import UniMath.RealNumbers.Fields.
Require Export UniMath.Algebra.DivisionRig.
Require Import UniMath.OrderTheory.Lattice.Lattice.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Opaque hq.

Local Open Scope hq_scope.

(** * Definition of non-negative rational numbers *)

Definition hnnq_set := carrier_subset (hqleh 0).

Local Definition hnnq_set_to_hq (r : hnnq_set) : hq := pr1 r.

Local Definition hq_to_hnnq_set (r : hq) (Hr : hqleh 0 r) : hnnq_set :=
  r ,, Hr.

Local Definition hnnq_zero: hnnq_set := hq_to_hnnq_set 0 (isreflhqleh 0).
Local Definition hnnq_one: hnnq_set := hq_to_hnnq_set 1 (hqlthtoleh 0 1 hq1_gt0).
Local Definition hnnq_plus: binop hnnq_set :=
  λ x y : hnnq_set, hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 x + pr1 y) (hq0lehandplus _ _ (pr2 x) (pr2 y)).

binop hnnq_set


binop hnnq_set

  
x, y: hnnq_set
hnnq_set

  
x, y: hnnq_set
H: pr1 x > pr1 y
hnnq_set
x, y: hnnq_set
hnnq_set

  
x, y: hnnq_set
H: pr1 x > pr1 y
hnnq_set
 exact (hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 x - pr1 y) (hq0leminus _ _ (hqlthtoleh _ _ H))).
  
x, y: hnnq_set
hnnq_set
 exact hnnq_zero.
Defined.
Local Definition hnnq_mult: binop hnnq_set :=
  λ x y : hnnq_set, hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 x * pr1 y) (hqmultgeh0geh0 (pr2 x) (pr2 y)).

unop hnnq_set


unop hnnq_set

  
x: hnnq_set
hnnq_set

  
x: hnnq_set
Hx0: 0 < pr1 x
hnnq_set
x: hnnq_set
hnnq_set

  
x: hnnq_set
Hx0: 0 < pr1 x
hnnq_set
 exact (hq_to_hnnq_set (/ pr1 x) (hqlthtoleh 0 (/ pr1 x) (hqinv_gt0 (pr1 x) Hx0))).
  
x: hnnq_set
hnnq_set
 exact x.
Defined.
Local Definition hnnq_div : binop hnnq_set := λ x y : hnnq_set, hnnq_mult x (hnnq_inv y).

(** ** Equality and order on non-negative rational numbers *)

Local Definition hnnq_le : hrel hnnq_set := resrel hqleh (hqleh 0).

ispreorder hnnq_le


ispreorder hnnq_le

  
istrans hnnq_le
isrefl hnnq_le

  
istrans hnnq_le
 
x, y, z: hnnq_set
hnnq_le x y → hnnq_le y z → hnnq_le x z

    now apply istranshqleh.
  
isrefl hnnq_le
 
x: hnnq_set
hnnq_le x x

    now apply isreflhqleh.
Qed.

Local Definition hnnq_ge : hrel hnnq_set := resrel hqgeh (hqleh 0).

ispreorder hnnq_ge


ispreorder hnnq_ge

  
H:= ispreorder_hnnq_le: ispreorder hnnq_le
ispreorder hnnq_ge

  
H:= ispreorder_hnnq_le: ispreorder hnnq_le
istrans hnnq_ge
H:= ispreorder_hnnq_le: ispreorder hnnq_le
isrefl hnnq_ge

  
H:= ispreorder_hnnq_le: ispreorder hnnq_le
istrans hnnq_ge
 
H:= ispreorder_hnnq_le: ispreorder hnnq_le
x, y, z: hnnq_set
Hxy: hnnq_ge x y
Hyz: hnnq_ge y z
hnnq_ge x z

    now apply (pr1 H) with y.
  
H:= ispreorder_hnnq_le: ispreorder hnnq_le
isrefl hnnq_ge
 
H:= ispreorder_hnnq_le: ispreorder hnnq_le
x: hnnq_set
hnnq_ge x x

    now apply (pr2 H).
Qed.

Local Definition hnnq_lt : hrel hnnq_set := resrel hqlth (hqleh 0).

isStrongOrder hnnq_lt


isStrongOrder hnnq_lt

  
istrans hnnq_lt
iscotrans hnnq_lt
isirrefl hnnq_lt

  
istrans hnnq_lt
 
x, y, z: hnnq_set
hnnq_lt x y → hnnq_lt y z → hnnq_lt x z

    now apply istranshqlth.
  
iscotrans hnnq_lt
 
x, y, z: hnnq_set
Hxz: hnnq_lt x z
hnnq_lt x y ∨ hnnq_lt y z

    
x, y, z: hnnq_set
Hxz: hnnq_lt x z
Hxy: pr1 x < pr1 y
hnnq_lt x y ∨ hnnq_lt y z
x, y, z: hnnq_set
Hxz: hnnq_lt x z
Hxy: pr1 x >= pr1 y
hnnq_lt x y ∨ hnnq_lt y z

    
x, y, z: hnnq_set
Hxz: hnnq_lt x z
Hxy: pr1 x < pr1 y
hnnq_lt x y ∨ hnnq_lt y z
 
x, y, z: hnnq_set
Hxz: hnnq_lt x z
Hxy: pr1 x < pr1 y
hnnq_lt x y

      exact Hxy.
    
x, y, z: hnnq_set
Hxz: hnnq_lt x z
Hxy: pr1 x >= pr1 y
hnnq_lt x y ∨ hnnq_lt y z
 
x, y, z: hnnq_set
Hxz: hnnq_lt x z
Hxy: pr1 x >= pr1 y
hnnq_lt y z

      
x, y, z: hnnq_set
Hxz: hnnq_lt x z
Hxy: pr1 x >= pr1 y
pr1 y <= pr1 x
x, y, z: hnnq_set
Hxz: hnnq_lt x z
Hxy: pr1 x >= pr1 y
pr1 x < pr1 z

      
x, y, z: hnnq_set
Hxz: hnnq_lt x z
Hxy: pr1 x >= pr1 y
pr1 y <= pr1 x
 exact Hxy.
      
x, y, z: hnnq_set
Hxz: hnnq_lt x z
Hxy: pr1 x >= pr1 y
pr1 x < pr1 z
 exact Hxz.
  
isirrefl hnnq_lt
 
x: hnnq_set
¬ hnnq_lt x x

    now apply isirreflhqlth.
Qed.

Local Definition hnnq_gt : hrel hnnq_set := resrel hqgth (hqleh 0).

isStrongOrder hnnq_gt


isStrongOrder hnnq_gt

  
H:= isStrongOrder_reverse hnnq_lt isStrongOrder_hnnq_lt: isStrongOrder (hrel_reverse hnnq_lt)
isStrongOrder hnnq_gt

  
H:= isStrongOrder_reverse hnnq_lt isStrongOrder_hnnq_lt: isStrongOrder (hrel_reverse hnnq_lt)
istrans hnnq_gt
H:= isStrongOrder_reverse hnnq_lt isStrongOrder_hnnq_lt: isStrongOrder (hrel_reverse hnnq_lt)
iscotrans hnnq_gt
H:= isStrongOrder_reverse hnnq_lt isStrongOrder_hnnq_lt: isStrongOrder (hrel_reverse hnnq_lt)
isirrefl hnnq_gt

  
H:= isStrongOrder_reverse hnnq_lt isStrongOrder_hnnq_lt: isStrongOrder (hrel_reverse hnnq_lt)
istrans hnnq_gt
 
H:= isStrongOrder_reverse hnnq_lt isStrongOrder_hnnq_lt: isStrongOrder (hrel_reverse hnnq_lt)
x, y, z: hnnq_set
hnnq_gt x y → hnnq_gt y z → hnnq_gt x z

    apply (istrans_isStrongOrder H).
  
H:= isStrongOrder_reverse hnnq_lt isStrongOrder_hnnq_lt: isStrongOrder (hrel_reverse hnnq_lt)
iscotrans hnnq_gt
 
H:= isStrongOrder_reverse hnnq_lt isStrongOrder_hnnq_lt: isStrongOrder (hrel_reverse hnnq_lt)
x, y, z: hnnq_set
hnnq_gt x z → hnnq_gt x y ∨ hnnq_gt y z

    apply (iscotrans_isStrongOrder H).
  
H:= isStrongOrder_reverse hnnq_lt isStrongOrder_hnnq_lt: isStrongOrder (hrel_reverse hnnq_lt)
isirrefl hnnq_gt
 
H:= isStrongOrder_reverse hnnq_lt isStrongOrder_hnnq_lt: isStrongOrder (hrel_reverse hnnq_lt)
x: hnnq_set
¬ hnnq_gt x x

    apply (isirrefl_isStrongOrder H).
Qed.


isEffectiveOrder hnnq_le hnnq_lt


isEffectiveOrder hnnq_le hnnq_lt

  
ispreorder hnnq_le
isStrongOrder hnnq_lt
x, y: hnnq_set
¬ hnnq_lt x y → hnnq_le y x
x, y: hnnq_set
hnnq_le y x → ¬ hnnq_lt x y
∏ x y z : hnnq_set,
hnnq_lt x y → hnnq_le y z → hnnq_lt x z
∏ x y z : hnnq_set,
hnnq_le x y → hnnq_lt y z → hnnq_lt x z

  
ispreorder hnnq_le
 exact ispreorder_hnnq_le.
  
isStrongOrder hnnq_lt
 exact isStrongOrder_hnnq_lt.
  
x, y: hnnq_set
¬ hnnq_lt x y → hnnq_le y x
 
x, y: hnnq_set
X: ¬ hnnq_lt x y
hnnq_le y x
 assumption.
  
x, y: hnnq_set
hnnq_le y x → ¬ hnnq_lt x y
 
x, y: hnnq_set
X: hnnq_le y x
¬ hnnq_lt x y
 assumption.
  
∏ x y z : hnnq_set,
hnnq_lt x y → hnnq_le y z → hnnq_lt x z
 
x, y, z: hnnq_set
hnnq_lt x y → hnnq_le y z → hnnq_lt x z

    now apply hqlthlehtrans.
  
∏ x y z : hnnq_set,
hnnq_le x y → hnnq_lt y z → hnnq_lt x z
 
x, y, z: hnnq_set
hnnq_le x y → hnnq_lt y z → hnnq_lt x z

    now apply hqlehlthtrans.
Qed.

(** ** hnnq is a half field *)


iscomm hnnq_plus


iscomm hnnq_plus

  
x, y: hnnq_set
hnnq_plus x y = hnnq_plus y x

  
x, y: hnnq_set
pr1 (hnnq_plus x y) = pr1 (hnnq_plus y x)

  now apply hqpluscomm.
Qed.

isassoc hnnq_plus


isassoc hnnq_plus

  
x, y, z: hnnq_set
hnnq_plus (hnnq_plus x y) z =
hnnq_plus x (hnnq_plus y z)

  
x, y, z: hnnq_set
pr1 (hnnq_plus (hnnq_plus x y) z) =
pr1 (hnnq_plus x (hnnq_plus y z))

  now apply hqplusassoc.
Qed.

islunit hnnq_plus hnnq_zero


islunit hnnq_plus hnnq_zero

  
x: hnnq_set
hnnq_plus hnnq_zero x = x

  
x: hnnq_set
pr1 (hnnq_plus hnnq_zero x) = pr1 x

  now apply hqplusl0.
Qed.

isrunit hnnq_plus hnnq_zero


isrunit hnnq_plus hnnq_zero

  
x: hnnq_set
hnnq_plus x hnnq_zero = x

  
x: hnnq_set
hnnq_plus hnnq_zero x = x

  now apply islunit_hnnq_zero_plus.
Qed.

iscomm hnnq_mult


iscomm hnnq_mult

  
x, y: hnnq_set
hnnq_mult x y = hnnq_mult y x

  
x, y: hnnq_set
pr1 (hnnq_mult x y) = pr1 (hnnq_mult y x)

  now apply hqmultcomm.
Qed.

isassoc hnnq_mult


isassoc hnnq_mult

  
x, y, z: hnnq_set
hnnq_mult (hnnq_mult x y) z =
hnnq_mult x (hnnq_mult y z)

  
x, y, z: hnnq_set
pr1 (hnnq_mult (hnnq_mult x y) z) =
pr1 (hnnq_mult x (hnnq_mult y z))

  now apply hqmultassoc.
Qed.

islunit hnnq_mult hnnq_one


islunit hnnq_mult hnnq_one

  
x: hnnq_set
hnnq_mult hnnq_one x = x

  
x: hnnq_set
pr1 (hnnq_mult hnnq_one x) = pr1 x

  now apply hqmultl1.
Qed.

isrunit hnnq_mult hnnq_one


isrunit hnnq_mult hnnq_one

  
x: hnnq_set
hnnq_mult x hnnq_one = x

  
x: hnnq_set
hnnq_mult hnnq_one x = x

  now apply islunit_hnnq_one_mult.
Qed.

islinv' hnnq_one hnnq_mult (hnnq_lt hnnq_zero)
  (λ x : (∑ y, hnnq_lt hnnq_zero y)%subset,
   hnnq_inv (pr1 x))


islinv' hnnq_one hnnq_mult (hnnq_lt hnnq_zero)
  (λ x : (∑ y, hnnq_lt hnnq_zero y)%subset,
   hnnq_inv (pr1 x))

  
x: hnnq_set
Hx0: hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
hnnq_mult (hnnq_inv (pr1 (x,, Hx0))) x = hnnq_one

  
x: hnnq_set
Hx0: hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
hnnq_mult
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (0 < pr11 (x,, Hx0))
            ⨿ (0 = pr11 (x,, Hx0)), hnnq_set)
     (λ Hx1 : 0 < pr11 (x,, Hx0),
      hq_to_hnnq_set (/ pr11 (x,, Hx0))
        (hqlthtoleh 0 (/ pr11 (x,, Hx0))
           (hqinv_gt0 (pr11 (x,, Hx0)) Hx1)))
     (λ _ : 0 = pr11 (x,, Hx0), pr1 (x,, Hx0))
     (hqlehchoice 0 (pr11 (x,, Hx0)) (pr21 (x,, Hx0))))
  x = hnnq_one

  
x: hnnq_set
Hx0: hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
hnnq_mult
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (0 < pr11 (x,, Hx0))
            ⨿ (0 = pr11 (x,, Hx0)), hnnq_set)
     (λ Hx1 : 0 < pr11 (x,, Hx0),
      hq_to_hnnq_set (/ pr11 (x,, Hx0))
        (hqlthtoleh 0 (/ pr11 (x,, Hx0))
           (hqinv_gt0 (pr11 (x,, Hx0)) Hx1)))
     (λ _ : 0 = pr11 (x,, Hx0), pr1 (x,, Hx0))
     (hqlehchoice 0 (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) x = hnnq_one

  
x: hnnq_set
Hx0: hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
∏ c : (0 < pr1 x) ⨿ (0 = pr1 x),
hnnq_mult
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (0 < pr11 (x,, Hx0))
            ⨿ (0 = pr11 (x,, Hx0)), hnnq_set)
     (λ Hx1 : 0 < pr11 (x,, Hx0),
      hq_to_hnnq_set (/ pr11 (x,, Hx0))
        (hqlthtoleh 0 (/ pr11 (x,, Hx0))
           (hqinv_gt0 (pr11 (x,, Hx0)) Hx1)))
     (λ _ : 0 = pr11 (x,, Hx0), pr1 (x,, Hx0)) c) x =
hnnq_one

  
x: hnnq_set
Hx0: hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
Hx0': 0 < pr1 x
hnnq_mult
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (0 < pr11 (x,, Hx0))
            ⨿ (0 = pr11 (x,, Hx0)), hnnq_set)
     (λ Hx1 : 0 < pr11 (x,, Hx0),
      hq_to_hnnq_set (/ pr11 (x,, Hx0))
        (hqlthtoleh 0 (/ pr11 (x,, Hx0))
           (hqinv_gt0 (pr11 (x,, Hx0)) Hx1)))
     (λ _ : 0 = pr11 (x,, Hx0), pr1 (x,, Hx0))
     (inl Hx0')) x = hnnq_one
x: hnnq_set
Hx0: hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
Hx0': 0 = pr1 x
hnnq_mult
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (0 < pr11 (x,, Hx0))
            ⨿ (0 = pr11 (x,, Hx0)), hnnq_set)
     (λ Hx1 : 0 < pr11 (x,, Hx0),
      hq_to_hnnq_set (/ pr11 (x,, Hx0))
        (hqlthtoleh 0 (/ pr11 (x,, Hx0))
           (hqinv_gt0 (pr11 (x,, Hx0)) Hx1)))
     (λ _ : 0 = pr11 (x,, Hx0), pr1 (x,, Hx0))
     (inr Hx0')) x = hnnq_one

  
x: hnnq_set
Hx0: hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
Hx0': 0 < pr1 x
hnnq_mult
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (0 < pr11 (x,, Hx0))
            ⨿ (0 = pr11 (x,, Hx0)), hnnq_set)
     (λ Hx1 : 0 < pr11 (x,, Hx0),
      hq_to_hnnq_set (/ pr11 (x,, Hx0))
        (hqlthtoleh 0 (/ pr11 (x,, Hx0))
           (hqinv_gt0 (pr11 (x,, Hx0)) Hx1)))
     (λ _ : 0 = pr11 (x,, Hx0), pr1 (x,, Hx0))
     (inl Hx0')) x = hnnq_one
 
x: hnnq_set
Hx0: hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
Hx0': 0 < pr1 x
pr1
  (hnnq_mult
     (coprod_rect
        (λ _ : (0 < pr11 (x,, Hx0))
               ⨿ (0 = pr11 (x,, Hx0)), hnnq_set)
        (λ Hx1 : 0 < pr11 (x,, Hx0),
         hq_to_hnnq_set (/ pr11 (x,, Hx0))
           (hqlthtoleh 0 (/ pr11 (x,, Hx0))
              (hqinv_gt0 (pr11 (x,, Hx0)) Hx1)))
        (λ _ : 0 = pr11 (x,, Hx0), pr1 (x,, Hx0))
        (inl Hx0')) x) = pr1 hnnq_one

    
x: hnnq_set
Hx0: hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
Hx0': 0 < pr1 x
hqneq (pr1 x) 0

    now apply (hqgth_hqneq (pr1 x) 0), Hx0'.
  
x: hnnq_set
Hx0: hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
Hx0': 0 = pr1 x
hnnq_mult
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (0 < pr11 (x,, Hx0))
            ⨿ (0 = pr11 (x,, Hx0)), hnnq_set)
     (λ Hx1 : 0 < pr11 (x,, Hx0),
      hq_to_hnnq_set (/ pr11 (x,, Hx0))
        (hqlthtoleh 0 (/ pr11 (x,, Hx0))
           (hqinv_gt0 (pr11 (x,, Hx0)) Hx1)))
     (λ _ : 0 = pr11 (x,, Hx0), pr1 (x,, Hx0))
     (inr Hx0')) x = hnnq_one
 
x: hnnq_set
Hx0: hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
Hx0': 0 = pr1 x
∅

    
x: hnnq_set
Hx0: hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
Hx0': 0 = pr1 x
pr1 x = 0 → ∅

    apply hqgth_hqneq, Hx0.
Qed.

isrinv' hnnq_one hnnq_mult (hnnq_lt hnnq_zero)
  (λ x : (∑ y, hnnq_lt hnnq_zero y)%subset,
   hnnq_inv (pr1 x))


isrinv' hnnq_one hnnq_mult (hnnq_lt hnnq_zero)
  (λ x : (∑ y, hnnq_lt hnnq_zero y)%subset,
   hnnq_inv (pr1 x))

  
x: hnnq_set
Hx: hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
hnnq_mult x (hnnq_inv (pr1 (x,, Hx))) = hnnq_one

  
x: hnnq_set
Hx: hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
hnnq_mult (hnnq_inv (pr1 (x,, Hx))) x = hnnq_one

  now apply islinv'_hnnq_inv.
Qed.

isldistr hnnq_plus hnnq_mult


isldistr hnnq_plus hnnq_mult

  
x, y, z: hnnq_set
hnnq_mult z (hnnq_plus x y) =
hnnq_plus (hnnq_mult z x) (hnnq_mult z y)

  
x, y, z: hnnq_set
pr1 (hnnq_mult z (hnnq_plus x y)) =
pr1 (hnnq_plus (hnnq_mult z x) (hnnq_mult z y))

  now apply hqldistr.
Qed.

isrdistr hnnq_plus hnnq_mult


isrdistr hnnq_plus hnnq_mult

  
x, y, z: hnnq_set
hnnq_mult (hnnq_plus x y) z =
hnnq_plus (hnnq_mult x z) (hnnq_mult y z)

  
x, y, z: hnnq_set
hnnq_mult z (hnnq_plus x y) =
hnnq_plus (hnnq_mult z x) (hnnq_mult z y)

  now apply isldistr_hnnq_plus_mult.
Qed.


isabmonoidop hnnq_plus


isabmonoidop hnnq_plus

  
isassoc hnnq_plus
isunital hnnq_plus
iscomm hnnq_plus

  
isassoc hnnq_plus
 exact isassoc_hnnq_plus.
  
isunital hnnq_plus
 
islunit hnnq_plus hnnq_zero
isrunit hnnq_plus hnnq_zero

    
islunit hnnq_plus hnnq_zero
 exact islunit_hnnq_zero_plus.
    
isrunit hnnq_plus hnnq_zero
 exact isrunit_hnnq_zero_plus.
  
iscomm hnnq_plus
 exact iscomm_hnnq_plus.
Defined.

ismonoidop hnnq_mult


ismonoidop hnnq_mult

  
isassoc hnnq_mult
isunital hnnq_mult

  
isassoc hnnq_mult
 exact isassoc_hnnq_mult.
  
isunital hnnq_mult
 
islunit hnnq_mult hnnq_one
isrunit hnnq_mult hnnq_one

    
islunit hnnq_mult hnnq_one
 exact islunit_hnnq_one_mult.
    
isrunit hnnq_mult hnnq_one
 exact isrunit_hnnq_one_mult.
Defined.

commrig


commrig

  
iscommrigops op1 op2

  
∑ axs : isabmonoidop op1 × ismonoidop op2,
(∏ x : hnnq_set,, hnnq_plus,, hnnq_mult,
 (unel_is (pr1 axs) * x)%ring = unel_is (pr1 axs))
× (∏ x : hnnq_set,, hnnq_plus,, hnnq_mult,
   (x * unel_is (pr1 axs))%ring = unel_is (pr1 axs))
isldistr op1 op2
isrdistr op1 op2
iscomm op2

  
∑ axs : isabmonoidop op1 × ismonoidop op2,
(∏ x : hnnq_set,, hnnq_plus,, hnnq_mult,
 (unel_is (pr1 axs) * x)%ring = unel_is (pr1 axs))
× (∏ x : hnnq_set,, hnnq_plus,, hnnq_mult,
   (x * unel_is (pr1 axs))%ring = unel_is (pr1 axs))
 
∏ x : hnnq_set,, hnnq_plus,, hnnq_mult,
(unel_is
   (pr1
      (isabmonoidop_hnnq_plus,, ismonoidop_hnnq_mult)) *
 x)%ring =
unel_is
  (pr1 (isabmonoidop_hnnq_plus,, ismonoidop_hnnq_mult))
∏ x : hnnq_set,, hnnq_plus,, hnnq_mult,
(x *
 unel_is
   (pr1
      (isabmonoidop_hnnq_plus,, ismonoidop_hnnq_mult)))%ring =
unel_is
  (pr1 (isabmonoidop_hnnq_plus,, ismonoidop_hnnq_mult))

    
∏ x : hnnq_set,, hnnq_plus,, hnnq_mult,
(unel_is
   (pr1
      (isabmonoidop_hnnq_plus,, ismonoidop_hnnq_mult)) *
 x)%ring =
unel_is
  (pr1 (isabmonoidop_hnnq_plus,, ismonoidop_hnnq_mult))
 
x: hnnq_set,, hnnq_plus,, hnnq_mult
(unel_is
   (pr1
      (isabmonoidop_hnnq_plus,, ismonoidop_hnnq_mult)) *
 x)%ring =
unel_is
  (pr1 (isabmonoidop_hnnq_plus,, ismonoidop_hnnq_mult))

      
x: hnnq_set,, hnnq_plus,, hnnq_mult
pr1
  (unel_is
     (pr1
        (isabmonoidop_hnnq_plus,, ismonoidop_hnnq_mult)) *
   x)%ring =
pr1
  (unel_is
     (pr1
        (isabmonoidop_hnnq_plus,, ismonoidop_hnnq_mult)))

      apply hqmult0x.
    
∏ x : hnnq_set,, hnnq_plus,, hnnq_mult,
(x *
 unel_is
   (pr1
      (isabmonoidop_hnnq_plus,, ismonoidop_hnnq_mult)))%ring =
unel_is
  (pr1 (isabmonoidop_hnnq_plus,, ismonoidop_hnnq_mult))
 
x: hnnq_set,, hnnq_plus,, hnnq_mult
(x *
 unel_is
   (pr1
      (isabmonoidop_hnnq_plus,, ismonoidop_hnnq_mult)))%ring =
unel_is
  (pr1 (isabmonoidop_hnnq_plus,, ismonoidop_hnnq_mult))

      
x: hnnq_set,, hnnq_plus,, hnnq_mult
pr1
  (x *
   unel_is
     (pr1
        (isabmonoidop_hnnq_plus,, ismonoidop_hnnq_mult)))%ring =
pr1
  (unel_is
     (pr1
        (isabmonoidop_hnnq_plus,, ismonoidop_hnnq_mult)))

      apply hqmultx0.
  
isldistr op1 op2
 exact isldistr_hnnq_plus_mult.
  
isrdistr op1 op2
 exact isrdistr_hnnq_plus_mult.
  
iscomm op2
 exact iscomm_hnnq_mult.
Defined.

CommDivRig


CommDivRig

  
isDivRig commrig_hnnq

  
DivisionRig.isnonzerorig commrig_hnnq
∏ x : commrig_hnnq,
x != 0%rig → multinvpair commrig_hnnq x

  
DivisionRig.isnonzerorig commrig_hnnq
 
H: 1%rig = 0%rig
∅

    
H: pr1 1%rig = pr1 0%rig
∅

    
H: ∅
∅
H: pr1 1%rig = pr1 0%rig
pr1 1%rig > pr1 0%rig

    
H: ∅
∅
 exact H.
    
H: pr1 1%rig = pr1 0%rig
pr1 1%rig > pr1 0%rig
 exact hq1_gt0.
  
∏ x : commrig_hnnq,
x != 0%rig → multinvpair commrig_hnnq x
 
x: commrig_hnnq
Hx: x != 0%rig
multinvpair commrig_hnnq x

    
x: commrig_hnnq
Hx: x != 0%rig
hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
x: commrig_hnnq
Hx: x != 0%rig
Hx': hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
multinvpair commrig_hnnq x

    
x: commrig_hnnq
Hx: x != 0%rig
hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
 
x: commrig_hnnq
Hx: x != 0%rig
¬ (pr1 x <= pr1 hnnq_zero)

      
x: commrig_hnnq
Hx: x != 0%rig
Hx0: pr1 x <= pr1 hnnq_zero
x = 0%rig

      
x: commrig_hnnq
Hx: x != 0%rig
Hx0: pr1 x <= pr1 hnnq_zero
isPredicate (λ x : hq, 0 <= x)
x: commrig_hnnq
Hx: x != 0%rig
Hx0: pr1 x <= pr1 hnnq_zero
pr1 x = pr1 0%rig

      
x: commrig_hnnq
Hx: x != 0%rig
Hx0: pr1 x <= pr1 hnnq_zero
isPredicate (λ x : hq, 0 <= x)
 now intro ;apply pr2.
      
x: commrig_hnnq
Hx: x != 0%rig
Hx0: pr1 x <= pr1 hnnq_zero
pr1 x = pr1 0%rig
 
x: commrig_hnnq
Hx: x != 0%rig
Hx0: pr1 x <= pr1 hnnq_zero
pr1 x <= pr1 0%rig
x: commrig_hnnq
Hx: x != 0%rig
Hx0: pr1 x <= pr1 hnnq_zero
pr1 0%rig <= pr1 x

        
x: commrig_hnnq
Hx: x != 0%rig
Hx0: pr1 x <= pr1 hnnq_zero
pr1 x <= pr1 0%rig
 apply Hx0.
        
x: commrig_hnnq
Hx: x != 0%rig
Hx0: pr1 x <= pr1 hnnq_zero
pr1 0%rig <= pr1 x
 apply (pr2 x). 
x: commrig_hnnq
Hx: x != 0%rig
Hx': hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
multinvpair commrig_hnnq x

    
x: commrig_hnnq
Hx: x != 0%rig
Hx': hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
(hnnq_inv x + x)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
x: commrig_hnnq
Hx: x != 0%rig
Hx': hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
(x + hnnq_inv x)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid

    
x: commrig_hnnq
Hx: x != 0%rig
Hx': hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
(hnnq_inv x + x)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
 now apply (islinv'_hnnq_inv x Hx').
    
x: commrig_hnnq
Hx: x != 0%rig
Hx': hnnq_lt hnnq_zero x
(x + hnnq_inv x)%addmonoid = 0%addmonoid
 now apply (isrinv'_hnnq_inv x Hx').
Defined.

(** * Exportable definitions and theorems *)

Definition NonnegativeRationals : CommDivRig := CommDivRig_hnnq.
Definition NonnegativeRationals_to_Rationals : NonnegativeRationals → hq :=
  pr1.
Definition Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (r : hq) (Hr : hqleh 0%hq r) : NonnegativeRationals :=
  tpair _ r Hr.

Declare Scope NRat_scope.
Delimit Scope NRat_scope with NRat.

(** ** Definitions *)

Definition NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet :=
  @pairEffectivelyOrderedSet NonnegativeRationals (pairEffectiveOrder _ _ isEffectiveOrder_hnnq).

Definition leNonnegativeRationals : po NonnegativeRationals :=
  EOle (X := NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet).
Definition geNonnegativeRationals : po NonnegativeRationals :=
  EOge (X := NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet).
Definition ltNonnegativeRationals : StrongOrder NonnegativeRationals :=
  EOlt (X := NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet).
Definition gtNonnegativeRationals : StrongOrder NonnegativeRationals :=
  EOgt (X := NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet).


Setting y constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ <= _".


Setting y constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ >= _".


Setting y constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ < _".


Setting y constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ > _".


Definition zeroNonnegativeRationals : NonnegativeRationals := hnnq_zero.
Definition oneNonnegativeRationals : NonnegativeRationals := hnnq_one.

Definition plusNonnegativeRationals (x y : NonnegativeRationals) : NonnegativeRationals :=
  hnnq_plus x y.
Definition minusNonnegativeRationals (x y : NonnegativeRationals) : NonnegativeRationals :=
  hnnq_minus x y.
Definition multNonnegativeRationals (x y : NonnegativeRationals) : NonnegativeRationals :=
  hnnq_mult x y.
Definition invNonnegativeRationals (x : NonnegativeRationals) : NonnegativeRationals :=
  hnnq_inv x.
Definition divNonnegativeRationals (x y : NonnegativeRationals) : NonnegativeRationals :=
  multNonnegativeRationals x (invNonnegativeRationals y).

Definition twoNonnegativeRationals : NonnegativeRationals :=
  Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals 2 (hqlthtoleh _ _ hq2_gt0).

Definition nat_to_NonnegativeRationals (n : nat) : NonnegativeRationals :=
  Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (hztohq (nattohz n)) (hztohqandleh 0%hz _ (nattohzandleh O n (natleh0n n))).

Notation "0" := zeroNonnegativeRationals : NRat_scope.
Notation "1" := oneNonnegativeRationals : NRat_scope.
Notation "2" := twoNonnegativeRationals : NRat_scope.


Setting y constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ + _".


Setting y constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ - _".


Setting y constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ * _".


Setting x constr at level 35
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"/ _".


Setting y constr at next level
to match previous notation with longest common prefix:
"_ / _".


Local Open Scope NRat_scope.

(** *** Correctness of definitions *)


0 =
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals 0%hq
  (isreflhqleh 0%hq)


0 =
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals 0%hq
  (isreflhqleh 0%hq)

  
pr1 0 =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals 0%hq
     (isreflhqleh 0%hq))

  reflexivity.
Qed.

1 = Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals 1%hq hq1ge0


1 = Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals 1%hq hq1ge0

  
pr1 1 =
pr1 (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals 1%hq hq1ge0)

  reflexivity.
Qed.

2 =
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals 2%hq
  (hqlthtoleh 0%hq 2%hq hq2_gt0)


2 =
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals 2%hq
  (hqlthtoleh 0%hq 2%hq hq2_gt0)

  
pr1 2 =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals 2%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq 2%hq hq2_gt0))

  reflexivity.
Qed.

∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
x + y =
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (pr1 x + pr1 y)%hq
  (hq0lehandplus (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x) (pr2 y))


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
x + y =
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (pr1 x + pr1 y)%hq
  (hq0lehandplus (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x) (pr2 y))

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
x + y =
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (pr1 x + pr1 y)%hq
  (hq0lehandplus (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x) (pr2 y))

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
pr1 (x + y) =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals
     (pr1 x + pr1 y)%hq
     (hq0lehandplus (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))

  reflexivity.
Qed.

∏ (x y : NonnegativeRationals) (Hminus : y <= x),
x - y =
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq
  (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x) Hminus)


∏ (x y : NonnegativeRationals) (Hminus : y <= x),
x - y =
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq
  (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x) Hminus)

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: y <= x
x - y =
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq
  (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H)

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: y <= x
pr1 (x - y) =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals
     (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H))

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: y <= x
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq ⨿ (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq,
      hnnq_set)
     (λ H : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq,
      hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq
        (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x)
           (hqlthtoleh (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H)))
     (λ _ : (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq, hnnq_zero)
     (hqgthorleh (pr1 x) (pr1 y))) =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals
     (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H))

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: y <= x
∏ c : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq ⨿ (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq,
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq ⨿ (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq,
      hnnq_set)
     (λ H : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq,
      hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq
        (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x)
           (hqlthtoleh (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H)))
     (λ _ : (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq, hnnq_zero) c) =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals
     (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H))

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: y <= x
Hgt: (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq ⨿ (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq,
      hnnq_set)
     (λ H : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq,
      hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq
        (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x)
           (hqlthtoleh (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H)))
     (λ _ : (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq, hnnq_zero) (inl Hgt)) =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals
     (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H))
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: y <= x
Hle: (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq ⨿ (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq,
      hnnq_set)
     (λ H : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq,
      hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq
        (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x)
           (hqlthtoleh (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H)))
     (λ _ : (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq, hnnq_zero) (inr Hle)) =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals
     (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H))

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: y <= x
Hgt: (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq ⨿ (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq,
      hnnq_set)
     (λ H : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq,
      hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq
        (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x)
           (hqlthtoleh (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H)))
     (λ _ : (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq, hnnq_zero) (inl Hgt)) =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals
     (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H))
 reflexivity.
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: y <= x
Hle: (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq ⨿ (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq,
      hnnq_set)
     (λ H : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq,
      hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq
        (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x)
           (hqlthtoleh (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H)))
     (λ _ : (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq, hnnq_zero) (inr Hle)) =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals
     (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H))
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: y <= x
Hle: (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq
Heq: pr1 x = pr1 y
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq ⨿ (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq,
      hnnq_set)
     (λ H : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq,
      hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq
        (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x)
           (hqlthtoleh (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H)))
     (λ _ : (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq, hnnq_zero) (inr Hle)) =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals
     (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H))

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: y <= x
Hle: (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq
Heq: pr1 x = pr1 y
pr1 hnnq_zero =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals
     (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H))

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: y <= x
Hle: (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq
Heq: pr1 x = pr1 y
∏ h : (0 <= pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq,
pr1 hnnq_zero =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals
     (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq h)

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: y <= x
Hle: (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq
Heq: pr1 x = pr1 y
∏ h : (0 <= 0)%hq,
pr1 hnnq_zero =
pr1 (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals 0%hq h)

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: y <= x
Hle: (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq
Heq: pr1 x = pr1 y
H0: (0 <= 0)%hq
pr1 hnnq_zero =
pr1 (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals 0%hq H0)

    reflexivity.
Qed.

∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
x * y =
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (pr1 x * pr1 y)%hq
  (hq0lehandmult (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x) (pr2 y))


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
x * y =
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (pr1 x * pr1 y)%hq
  (hq0lehandmult (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x) (pr2 y))

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
x * y =
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (pr1 x * pr1 y)%hq
  (hq0lehandmult (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x) (pr2 y))

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
pr1 (x * y) =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals
     (pr1 x * pr1 y)%hq
     (hq0lehandmult (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr2 x) (pr2 y)))

  reflexivity.
Qed.

∏ (x : NonnegativeRationals) (Hx : 0 < x),
/ x =
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (/ pr1 x)%hq
  (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ pr1 x)%hq (hqinv_gt0 (pr1 x) Hx))


∏ (x : NonnegativeRationals) (Hx : 0 < x),
/ x =
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (/ pr1 x)%hq
  (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ pr1 x)%hq (hqinv_gt0 (pr1 x) Hx))

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx0: 0 < x
/ x =
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (/ pr1 x)%hq
  (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ pr1 x)%hq
     (hqinv_gt0 (pr1 x) Hx0))

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx0: 0 < x
pr1 (/ x) =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (/ pr1 x)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ pr1 x)%hq
        (hqinv_gt0 (pr1 x) Hx0)))

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx0: 0 < x
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (0 < pr1 x)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = pr1 x), hnnq_set)
     (λ Hx0 : (0 < pr1 x)%hq,
      hq_to_hnnq_set (/ pr1 x)%hq
        (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ pr1 x)%hq
           (hqinv_gt0 (pr1 x) Hx0)))
     (λ _ : 0%hq = pr1 x, x)
     (hqlehchoice 0%hq (pr1 x) (pr2 x))) =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (/ pr1 x)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ pr1 x)%hq
        (hqinv_gt0 (pr1 x) Hx0)))

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx0: 0 < x
∏ c : (0 < pr1 x)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = pr1 x),
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (0 < pr1 x)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = pr1 x), hnnq_set)
     (λ Hx0 : (0 < pr1 x)%hq,
      hq_to_hnnq_set (/ pr1 x)%hq
        (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ pr1 x)%hq
           (hqinv_gt0 (pr1 x) Hx0)))
     (λ _ : 0%hq = pr1 x, x) c) =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (/ pr1 x)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ pr1 x)%hq
        (hqinv_gt0 (pr1 x) Hx0)))

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx0: 0 < x
Hlt: (0 < pr1 x)%hq
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (0 < pr1 x)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = pr1 x), hnnq_set)
     (λ Hx0 : (0 < pr1 x)%hq,
      hq_to_hnnq_set (/ pr1 x)%hq
        (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ pr1 x)%hq
           (hqinv_gt0 (pr1 x) Hx0)))
     (λ _ : 0%hq = pr1 x, x) (inl Hlt)) =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (/ pr1 x)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ pr1 x)%hq
        (hqinv_gt0 (pr1 x) Hx0)))
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx0: 0 < x
Heq: 0%hq = pr1 x
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (0 < pr1 x)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = pr1 x), hnnq_set)
     (λ Hx0 : (0 < pr1 x)%hq,
      hq_to_hnnq_set (/ pr1 x)%hq
        (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ pr1 x)%hq
           (hqinv_gt0 (pr1 x) Hx0)))
     (λ _ : 0%hq = pr1 x, x) (inr Heq)) =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (/ pr1 x)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ pr1 x)%hq
        (hqinv_gt0 (pr1 x) Hx0)))

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx0: 0 < x
Hlt: (0 < pr1 x)%hq
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (0 < pr1 x)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = pr1 x), hnnq_set)
     (λ Hx0 : (0 < pr1 x)%hq,
      hq_to_hnnq_set (/ pr1 x)%hq
        (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ pr1 x)%hq
           (hqinv_gt0 (pr1 x) Hx0)))
     (λ _ : 0%hq = pr1 x, x) (inl Hlt)) =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (/ pr1 x)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ pr1 x)%hq
        (hqinv_gt0 (pr1 x) Hx0)))
 reflexivity.
  
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx0: 0 < x
Heq: 0%hq = pr1 x
pr1
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (0 < pr1 x)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = pr1 x), hnnq_set)
     (λ Hx0 : (0 < pr1 x)%hq,
      hq_to_hnnq_set (/ pr1 x)%hq
        (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ pr1 x)%hq
           (hqinv_gt0 (pr1 x) Hx0)))
     (λ _ : 0%hq = pr1 x, x) (inr Heq)) =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (/ pr1 x)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ pr1 x)%hq
        (hqinv_gt0 (pr1 x) Hx0)))
 
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx0: 0 < x
Heq: 0%hq = pr1 x
0 < x → ∅

    
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx0: 0 < x
Heq: 0%hq = pr1 x
0 < pr1 x,, pr2 x → ∅

    
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx0: 0 < x
Heq: 0%hq = pr1 x
∏ h : (0 <= pr1 x)%hq, 0 < pr1 x,, h → ∅

    
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx0: 0 < x
Heq: 0%hq = pr1 x
h: (0 <= 0)%hq
0 < 0%hq,, h → ∅

    exact (isirreflhqlth 0%hq).
Qed.


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
(x <= y) = (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
(x <= y) = (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
(x <= y) = (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq

  reflexivity.
Qed.

∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
(x >= y) = (pr1 x >= pr1 y)%hq


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
(x >= y) = (pr1 x >= pr1 y)%hq

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
(x >= y) = (pr1 x >= pr1 y)%hq

  reflexivity.
Qed.

∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
(x < y) = (pr1 x < pr1 y)%hq


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
(x < y) = (pr1 x < pr1 y)%hq

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
(x < y) = (pr1 x < pr1 y)%hq

  reflexivity.
Qed.

∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
(x > y) = (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
(x > y) = (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
(x > y) = (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq

  reflexivity.
Qed.

(** ** Theorems about order *)

(** *** Decidability *)


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, (x = y) ⨿ (x != y)


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, (x = y) ⨿ (x != y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
(x = y) ⨿ (x != y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: pr1 x = pr1 y
(x = y) ⨿ (x != y)
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: pr1 x != pr1 y
(x = y) ⨿ (x != y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: pr1 x = pr1 y
(x = y) ⨿ (x != y)
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: pr1 x = pr1 y
x = y

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: pr1 x = pr1 y
pr1 x = pr1 y

    exact H.
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: pr1 x != pr1 y
(x = y) ⨿ (x != y)
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: pr1 x != pr1 y
x != y

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: pr1 x != pr1 y
H0: x = y
pr1 x = pr1 y

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: pr1 x != pr1 y
x = y → pr1 x = pr1 y

    apply base_paths.
Qed.

∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, (x <= y) ⨿ ¬ (x <= y)


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, (x <= y) ⨿ ¬ (x <= y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
(x <= y) ⨿ ¬ (x <= y)

  apply isdecrelhqleh.
Qed.

∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, (x < y) ⨿ ¬ (x < y)


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, (x < y) ⨿ ¬ (x < y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
(x < y) ⨿ ¬ (x < y)

  apply isdecrelhqlth.
Qed.


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
x <= y → (x = y) ⨿ (x < y)


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
x <= y → (x = y) ⨿ (x < y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
(x = y) ⨿ (x < y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
Hlt: (pr1 x < pr1 y)%hq
(x = y) ⨿ (x < y)
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
Heq: pr1 x = pr1 y
(x = y) ⨿ (x < y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
Hlt: (pr1 x < pr1 y)%hq
(x = y) ⨿ (x < y)
 right ; exact Hlt.
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
Heq: pr1 x = pr1 y
(x = y) ⨿ (x < y)
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
Heq: pr1 x = pr1 y
x = y

    now apply subtypePath_prop, Heq.
Qed.

∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
x != y → (x < y) ⨿ (x > y)


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
x != y → (x < y) ⨿ (x > y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hneq: x != y
(x < y) ⨿ (x > y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hneq: x != y
Hle: x <= y
(x < y) ⨿ (x > y)
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hneq: x != y
Hlt: ¬ (x <= y)
(x < y) ⨿ (x > y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hneq: x != y
Hle: x <= y
(x < y) ⨿ (x > y)
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hneq: x != y
Hle: x <= y
x < y

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hneq: x != y
Hle: (x = y) ⨿ (x < y)
x < y

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hneq: x != y
Heq: x = y
x < y
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hneq: x != y
Hlt: x < y
x < y

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hneq: x != y
Heq: x = y
x < y
 now apply fromempty, Hneq, Heq.
    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hneq: x != y
Hlt: x < y
x < y
 exact Hlt.
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hneq: x != y
Hlt: ¬ (x <= y)
(x < y) ⨿ (x > y)
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hneq: x != y
Hlt: ¬ (x <= y)
x > y

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hneq: x != y
Hlt: ¬ (x <= y)
¬ (pr1 y >= pr1 x)%hq

    exact Hlt.
Qed.

∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, (x = 0) ⨿ (0 < x)


∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, (x = 0) ⨿ (0 < x)

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
(x = 0) ⨿ (0 < x)

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: 0 = x
(x = 0) ⨿ (0 < x)
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: 0 < x
(x = 0) ⨿ (0 < x)

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: 0 = x
(x = 0) ⨿ (0 < x)
 rewrite Hx ; now left.
  
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: 0 < x
(x = 0) ⨿ (0 < x)
 right ; exact Hx.
Qed.

(** *** Basic theorems about order *)

Definition lt_leNonnegativeRationals :
  ∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, x < y -> x <= y
  := EOlt_le (X := NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet).

Definition isrefl_leNonnegativeRationals:
  ∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, x <= x :=
  isrefl_EOle (X := NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet).
Definition istrans_leNonnegativeRationals:
  ∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals, x <= y -> y <= z -> x <= z :=
  istrans_EOle (X := NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet).
Definition isirrefl_ltNonnegativeRationals:
  ∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, ¬ (x < x) :=
  isirrefl_EOlt (X := NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet).
Definition istrans_ltNonnegativeRationals :
  ∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals, x < y -> y < z -> x < z
  := istrans_EOlt (X := NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet).
Definition istrans_lt_le_ltNonnegativeRationals:
  ∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals, x < y -> y <= z -> x < z
  := istrans_EOlt_le (X := NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet).
Definition istrans_le_lt_ltNonnegativeRationals :
  ∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals, x <= y -> y < z -> x < z
  := istrans_EOle_lt (X := NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet).


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, x <= y → y <= x → x = y


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, x <= y → y <= x → x = y

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
Hge: y <= x
x = y

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
Hge: y <= x
pr1 x = pr1 y

  now apply isantisymmhqleh.
Qed.

Definition ge_leNonnegativeRationals:
  ∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, (x >= y) <-> (y <= x)
  := EOge_le (X := NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet).
Definition lt_gtNonnegativeRationals:
  ∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, (x > y) <-> (y < x)
  := EOgt_lt (X := NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet).
Definition notlt_geNonnegativeRationals:
  ∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, (¬ (x < y)) <-> (y <= x)
  := not_EOlt_le (X := NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet).

∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, ¬ (y <= x) <-> x < y


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, ¬ (y <= x) <-> x < y

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
¬ (y <= x) <-> x < y

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
¬ (y <= x) → x < y
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
x < y → ¬ (y <= x)

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
¬ (y <= x) → x < y
 now apply neghqgehtolth.
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
x < y → ¬ (y <= x)
 now apply hqlthtoneghqgeh.
Qed.

Definition ltNonnegativeRationals_noteq :
  ∏ x y, x < y -> x != y
  := EOlt_noteq (X := NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet).
Definition gtNonnegativeRationals_noteq :
  ∏ x y, x > y -> x != y
  := EOgt_noteq (X := NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet).


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
x < y → ∑ t : NonnegativeRationals, x < t × t < y


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
x < y → ∑ t : NonnegativeRationals, x < t × t < y

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: x < y
∑ t : NonnegativeRationals, x < t × t < y

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: x < y
z:= hqlth_between (pr1 x) (pr1 y) H: ∑ z : hq, (pr1 x < z)%hq × (z < pr1 y)%hq
∑ t : NonnegativeRationals, x < t × t < y

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: x < y
z:= hqlth_between (pr1 x) (pr1 y) H: ∑ z : hq, (pr1 x < z)%hq × (z < pr1 y)%hq
(0 <= pr1 z)%hq
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: x < y
z:= hqlth_between (pr1 x) (pr1 y) H: ∑ z : hq, (pr1 x < z)%hq × (z < pr1 y)%hq
Hz: (0 <= pr1 z)%hq
∑ t : NonnegativeRationals, x < t × t < y

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: x < y
z:= hqlth_between (pr1 x) (pr1 y) H: ∑ z : hq, (pr1 x < z)%hq × (z < pr1 y)%hq
(0 <= pr1 z)%hq
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: x < y
z:= hqlth_between (pr1 x) (pr1 y) H: ∑ z : hq, (pr1 x < z)%hq × (z < pr1 y)%hq
(0 <= pr1 x)%hq
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: x < y
z:= hqlth_between (pr1 x) (pr1 y) H: ∑ z : hq, (pr1 x < z)%hq × (z < pr1 y)%hq
(pr1 x <= pr1 z)%hq

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: x < y
z:= hqlth_between (pr1 x) (pr1 y) H: ∑ z : hq, (pr1 x < z)%hq × (z < pr1 y)%hq
(0 <= pr1 x)%hq
 now apply (pr2 x). 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: x < y
z:= hqlth_between (pr1 x) (pr1 y) H: ∑ z : hq, (pr1 x < z)%hq × (z < pr1 y)%hq
(pr1 x <= pr1 z)%hq

    apply (hqlthtoleh (pr1 x) (pr1 z)), (pr1 (pr2 z)). 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: x < y
z:= hqlth_between (pr1 x) (pr1 y) H: ∑ z : hq, (pr1 x < z)%hq × (z < pr1 y)%hq
Hz: (0 <= pr1 z)%hq
∑ t : NonnegativeRationals, x < t × t < y

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: x < y
z:= hqlth_between (pr1 x) (pr1 y) H: ∑ z : hq, (pr1 x < z)%hq × (z < pr1 y)%hq
Hz: (0 <= pr1 z)%hq
x < hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 z) Hz
× hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 z) Hz < y

  exact (pr2 z).
Qed.

(** *** Order and 0 *)


∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, 0 <= x


∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, 0 <= x

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
0 <= x

  apply (pr2 x).
Qed.

∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, ¬ (x < 0)


∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, ¬ (x < 0)

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
¬ (x < 0)

  apply (pr2 x).
Qed.


∏ r : NonnegativeRationals, r <= 0 → r = 0


∏ r : NonnegativeRationals, r <= 0 → r = 0

  
r: NonnegativeRationals
Hr0: r <= 0
r = 0

  
r: NonnegativeRationals
Hr0: r <= 0
pr1 r = pr1 0

  
r: NonnegativeRationals
Hr0: r <= 0
(pr1 r <= pr1 0%NRat)%hq
r: NonnegativeRationals
Hr0: r <= 0
(pr1 0%NRat <= pr1 r)%hq

  
r: NonnegativeRationals
Hr0: r <= 0
(pr1 r <= pr1 0%NRat)%hq
 apply Hr0.
  
r: NonnegativeRationals
Hr0: r <= 0
(pr1 0%NRat <= pr1 r)%hq
 apply (pr2 r).
Qed.

∏ r : NonnegativeRationals, r != 0 → 0 < r


∏ r : NonnegativeRationals, r != 0 → 0 < r

  
r: NonnegativeRationals
Hr0: r != 0
0 < r

  
r: NonnegativeRationals
Hr0: r != 0
¬ (pr1 r <= pr1 0%NRat)%hq

  
r: NonnegativeRationals
Hr0: r != 0
H: (pr1 r <= pr1 0%NRat)%hq
r = 0

  now apply NonnegativeRationals_eq0_le0.
Qed.


0 < 1


0 < 1

  exact hq1_gt0.
Qed.

0 < 2


0 < 2

  exact hq2_gt0.
Qed.

1 < 2


1 < 2

  
(1 < 2)%hq

  
(1 + 0 < 1 + 1)%hq

  
(0 < 1)%hq

  exact hq1_gt0.
Qed.

(** ** Theorems about algebra *)
(** *** Addition *)
(** Rewritings *)

Definition isassoc_plusNonnegativeRationals:
  ∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals, x + y + z = x + (y + z) :=
  CommDivRig_isassoc_plus.

Definition islunit_zeroNonnegativeRationals:
  ∏ r : NonnegativeRationals, 0 + r = r :=
  CommDivRig_islunit_zero.

Definition isrunit_zeroNonnegativeRationals:
  ∏ r : NonnegativeRationals, r + 0 = r :=
  CommDivRig_isrunit_zero.

Definition iscomm_plusNonnegativeRationals:
  ∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, x + y = y + x :=
  CommDivRig_iscomm_plus.

(** Order *)


∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals,
y < z <-> y + x < z + x


∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals,
y < z <-> y + x < z + x

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
y < z <-> y + x < z + x

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
y < z → y + x < z + x
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
y + x < z + x → y < z

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
y < z → y + x < z + x
 now apply hqlthandplusr.
  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
y + x < z + x → y < z
 now apply hqlthandplusrinv.
Qed.

∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals,
y < z <-> x + y < x + z


∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals,
y < z <-> x + y < x + z

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
y < z <-> x + y < x + z

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
y < z <-> y + x < z + x

  now apply plusNonnegativeRationals_ltcompat_r.
Qed.


∏ r q n : NonnegativeRationals,
q <= n <-> q + r <= n + r


∏ r q n : NonnegativeRationals,
q <= n <-> q + r <= n + r

  
r, q, n: NonnegativeRationals
q <= n <-> q + r <= n + r

  
r, q, n: NonnegativeRationals
q <= n → q + r <= n + r
r, q, n: NonnegativeRationals
q + r <= n + r → q <= n

  
r, q, n: NonnegativeRationals
q <= n → q + r <= n + r
 now apply hqlehandplusr.
  
r, q, n: NonnegativeRationals
q + r <= n + r → q <= n
 now apply hqlehandplusrinv.
Qed.

∏ r q n : NonnegativeRationals,
q <= n <-> r + q <= r + n


∏ r q n : NonnegativeRationals,
q <= n <-> r + q <= r + n

  
r, q, n: NonnegativeRationals
q <= n <-> r + q <= r + n

  
r, q, n: NonnegativeRationals
q <= n <-> q + r <= n + r

  now apply plusNonnegativeRationals_lecompat_r.
Qed.


∏ k x y : NonnegativeRationals, k + x = k + y → x = y


∏ k x y : NonnegativeRationals, k + x = k + y → x = y

  
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H: k + x = k + y
x = y

  apply isantisymm_leNonnegativeRationals ;
    apply_pr2 (plusNonnegativeRationals_lecompat_l k) ;
    rewrite H ;
    apply isrefl_leNonnegativeRationals.
Qed.

∏ k x y : NonnegativeRationals, x + k = y + k → x = y


∏ k x y : NonnegativeRationals, x + k = y + k → x = y

  
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
x + k = y + k → x = y

  
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
k + x = k + y → x = y

  now apply plusNonnegativeRationals_eqcompat_l.
Qed.


∏ x x' y y' : NonnegativeRationals,
x < x' → y < y' → x + y < x' + y'


∏ x x' y y' : NonnegativeRationals,
x < x' → y < y' → x + y < x' + y'

  
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeRationals
Hx: x < x'
Hy: y < y'
x + y < x' + y'

  
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeRationals
Hx: x < x'
Hy: y < y'
x + y < x + y'
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeRationals
Hx: x < x'
Hy: y < y'
x + y' < x' + y'

  
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeRationals
Hx: x < x'
Hy: y < y'
x + y < x + y'
 now apply hqlthandplusl, Hy.
  
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeRationals
Hx: x < x'
Hy: y < y'
x + y' < x' + y'
 now apply hqlthandplusr, Hx.
Qed.

∏ x x' y y' : NonnegativeRationals,
x <= x' → y < y' → x + y < x' + y'


∏ x x' y y' : NonnegativeRationals,
x <= x' → y < y' → x + y < x' + y'

  
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeRationals
Hx: x <= x'
Hy: y < y'
x + y < x' + y'

  
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeRationals
Hx: x <= x'
Hy: y < y'
x + y < x + y'
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeRationals
Hx: x <= x'
Hy: y < y'
x + y' <= x' + y'

  
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeRationals
Hx: x <= x'
Hy: y < y'
x + y < x + y'
 now apply hqlthandplusl, Hy.
  
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeRationals
Hx: x <= x'
Hy: y < y'
x + y' <= x' + y'
 now apply hqlehandplusr, Hx.
Qed.

∏ x x' y y' : NonnegativeRationals,
x < x' → y <= y' → x + y < x' + y'


∏ x x' y y' : NonnegativeRationals,
x < x' → y <= y' → x + y < x' + y'

  
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeRationals
Hx: x < x'
Hy: y <= y'
x + y < x' + y'

  
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeRationals
Hx: x < x'
Hy: y <= y'
x + y <= x + y'
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeRationals
Hx: x < x'
Hy: y <= y'
x + y' < x' + y'

  
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeRationals
Hx: x < x'
Hy: y <= y'
x + y <= x + y'
 now apply hqlehandplusl, Hy.
  
x, x', y, y': NonnegativeRationals
Hx: x < x'
Hy: y <= y'
x + y' < x' + y'
 now apply hqlthandplusr, Hx.
Qed.


∏ r q : NonnegativeRationals, r <= r + q


∏ r q : NonnegativeRationals, r <= r + q

  
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
r <= r + q

  
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
(λ p : NonnegativeRationals, p <= r + q) r

  
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
r + 0 <= r + q

  
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
(pr1 0%NRat <= pr1 q)%hq

  apply (pr2 q).
Qed.

∏ r q : NonnegativeRationals, r <= q + r


∏ r q : NonnegativeRationals, r <= q + r

  
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
r <= q + r

  
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
r <= r + q

  now apply plusNonnegativeRationals_le_r.
Qed.


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, 0 < x → 0 < x + y


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, 0 < x → 0 < x + y

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: 0 < x
0 < x + y

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: 0 < x
0 < x
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: 0 < x
x <= x + y

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: 0 < x
0 < x
 exact Hx.
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: 0 < x
x <= x + y
 now apply plusNonnegativeRationals_le_r.
Qed.

∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, 0 < y → 0 < x + y

Hy: 0 < y
0 < x + y

Hy: 0 < y
0 < y
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy: 0 < y
y <= x + y

Hy: 0 < y
0 < y
 exact Hy.
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy: 0 < y
y <= x + y
 now apply plusNonnegativeRationals_le_l.
Qed.


∏ r q : NonnegativeRationals, 0 < q → r < r + q


∏ r q : NonnegativeRationals, 0 < q → r < r + q

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
x < x + y

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
(λ p : NonnegativeRationals, p < x + y) x

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
x + 0 < x + y

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
0 < y

  exact Hy0.
Qed.

∏ r q : NonnegativeRationals, 0 < r → q < r + q


∏ r q : NonnegativeRationals, 0 < r → q < r + q

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
0 < x → y < x + y

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
0 < x → y < y + x

  now apply plusNonnegativeRationals_lt_r.
Qed.

(** *** Substraction *)
(** Rewriting *)


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, x <= y → x - y = 0


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, x <= y → x - y = 0

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
x - y = 0

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq ⨿ (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq,
   hnnq_set)
  (λ H : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq
     (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x)
        (hqlthtoleh (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H)))
  (λ _ : (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq, hnnq_zero)
  (hqgthorleh (pr1 x) (pr1 y)) = 0

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
∏ c : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq ⨿ (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq,
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq ⨿ (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq,
   hnnq_set)
  (λ H : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq
     (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x)
        (hqlthtoleh (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H)))
  (λ _ : (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq, hnnq_zero) c = 0

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
H: (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq ⨿ (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq,
   hnnq_set)
  (λ H : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq
     (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x)
        (hqlthtoleh (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H)))
  (λ _ : (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq, hnnq_zero) (inl H) = 0
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
H: (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq ⨿ (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq,
   hnnq_set)
  (λ H : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq
     (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x)
        (hqlthtoleh (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H)))
  (λ _ : (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq, hnnq_zero) (inr H) = 0

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
H: (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq ⨿ (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq,
   hnnq_set)
  (λ H : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq
     (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x)
        (hqlthtoleh (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H)))
  (λ _ : (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq, hnnq_zero) (inl H) = 0
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
H: (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq
∅

    exact (Hle H).
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
H: (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq ⨿ (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq,
   hnnq_set)
  (λ H : (pr1 x > pr1 y)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq
     (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x)
        (hqlthtoleh (pr1 y) (pr1 x) H)))
  (λ _ : (pr1 x <= pr1 y)%hq, hnnq_zero) (inr H) = 0
 reflexivity.
Qed.

∏ r q : NonnegativeRationals, r <= q → q - r + r = q


∏ r q : NonnegativeRationals, r <= q → q - r + r = q

  
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
H: r <= q
q - r + r = q

  
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
H: r <= q
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq ⨿ (pr1 q <= pr1 r)%hq,
   hnnq_set)
  (λ H : (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 q - pr1 r)%hq
     (hq0leminus (pr1 r) (pr1 q)
        (hqlthtoleh (pr1 r) (pr1 q) H)))
  (λ _ : (pr1 q <= pr1 r)%hq, hnnq_zero)
  (hqgthorleh (pr1 q) (pr1 r)) + r = q

  
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
H: r <= q
∏ c : (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq ⨿ (pr1 q <= pr1 r)%hq,
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq ⨿ (pr1 q <= pr1 r)%hq,
   hnnq_set)
  (λ H : (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 q - pr1 r)%hq
     (hq0leminus (pr1 r) (pr1 q)
        (hqlthtoleh (pr1 r) (pr1 q) H)))
  (λ _ : (pr1 q <= pr1 r)%hq, hnnq_zero) c + r = q

  
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
H: r <= q
H': (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq ⨿ (pr1 q <= pr1 r)%hq,
   hnnq_set)
  (λ H : (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 q - pr1 r)%hq
     (hq0leminus (pr1 r) (pr1 q)
        (hqlthtoleh (pr1 r) (pr1 q) H)))
  (λ _ : (pr1 q <= pr1 r)%hq, hnnq_zero) (inl H') + r =
q
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
H: r <= q
H': (pr1 q <= pr1 r)%hq
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq ⨿ (pr1 q <= pr1 r)%hq,
   hnnq_set)
  (λ H : (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 q - pr1 r)%hq
     (hq0leminus (pr1 r) (pr1 q)
        (hqlthtoleh (pr1 r) (pr1 q) H)))
  (λ _ : (pr1 q <= pr1 r)%hq, hnnq_zero) (inr H') + r =
q

  
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
H: r <= q
H': (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq ⨿ (pr1 q <= pr1 r)%hq,
   hnnq_set)
  (λ H : (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 q - pr1 r)%hq
     (hq0leminus (pr1 r) (pr1 q)
        (hqlthtoleh (pr1 r) (pr1 q) H)))
  (λ _ : (pr1 q <= pr1 r)%hq, hnnq_zero) (inl H') + r =
q
 
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
H: r <= q
H': (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq
hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 q - pr1 r)%hq
  (hq0leminus (pr1 r) (pr1 q)
     (hqlthtoleh (pr1 r) (pr1 q) H')) + r = q

    
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
H: r <= q
H': (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq
pr1
  (hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 q - pr1 r)%hq
     (hq0leminus (pr1 r) (pr1 q)
        (hqlthtoleh (pr1 r) (pr1 q) H')) + r) = pr1 q

    
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
H: r <= q
H': (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq
pr1
  (hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 q + - pr1 r)%hq
     (hq0leminus (pr1 r) (pr1 q)
        (hqlthtoleh (pr1 r) (pr1 q) H')) + r) = pr1 q

    
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
H: r <= q
H': (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq
(λ p : NonnegativeRationals,
 pr1
   (hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 q + - pr1 r)%hq
      (hq0leminus (pr1 r) (pr1 q)
         (hqlthtoleh (pr1 r) (pr1 q) H')) + p) = pr1 q)
  r

    
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
H: r <= q
H': (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq
(pr1 q + - pr1 r + pr1 r)%hq = pr1 q

    
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
H: r <= q
H': (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq
r', q': hq
Hr: (0 <= r')%hq
Hrq: (0 <= q' - r')%hq
(q' + - r' + r')%hq = q'

    now rewrite hqplusassoc, hqlminus, hqplusr0.
  
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
H: r <= q
H': (pr1 q <= pr1 r)%hq
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq ⨿ (pr1 q <= pr1 r)%hq,
   hnnq_set)
  (λ H : (pr1 q > pr1 r)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 q - pr1 r)%hq
     (hq0leminus (pr1 r) (pr1 q)
        (hqlthtoleh (pr1 r) (pr1 q) H)))
  (λ _ : (pr1 q <= pr1 r)%hq, hnnq_zero) (inr H') + r =
q
 
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
H: r <= q
H': (pr1 q <= pr1 r)%hq
hnnq_zero + r = q

    
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
H: r <= q
H': (pr1 q <= pr1 r)%hq
pr1 (hnnq_zero + r) = pr1 q

    
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
H: r <= q
H': (pr1 q <= pr1 r)%hq
pr1 r = pr1 q → pr1 (hnnq_zero + r) = pr1 q

    
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
H: r <= q
H': (pr1 q <= pr1 r)%hq
pr1 r = pr1 q → (0 + pr1 r)%hq = pr1 q

    
r, q: NonnegativeRationals
H: r <= q
H': (pr1 q <= pr1 r)%hq
r': hq
Hr': (0 <= r')%hq
q': hq
Heq: r' = q'
(0 + r')%hq = q'

    now rewrite hqplusl0.
Qed.


∏ q r : NonnegativeRationals, r + q - q = r


∏ q r : NonnegativeRationals, r + q - q = r

  
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
r + q - q = r

  
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
(pr1 r,, pr2 r) + q - q = pr1 r,, pr2 r

  
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
r': hq
Hr: (0 <= r')%hq
q': hq
Hq: (0 <= q')%hq
(r',, Hr) + q - q = r',, Hr

  
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
r': hq
Hr: (0 <= r')%hq
q': hq
Hq: (0 <= q')%hq
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals
  (pr1 ((r',, Hr) + q)%NRat - pr1 q)%hq
  (hq0leminus (pr1 q) (pr1 ((r',, Hr) + q))
     (plusNonnegativeRationals_le_l q (r',, Hr))) =
r',, Hr

  
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
r': hq
Hr: (0 <= r')%hq
q': hq
Hq: (0 <= q')%hq
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals
     (pr1 ((r',, Hr) + q)%NRat - pr1 q)%hq
     (hq0leminus (pr1 q) (pr1 ((r',, Hr) + q))
        (plusNonnegativeRationals_le_l q (r',, Hr)))) =
pr1 (r',, Hr)

  
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
r': hq
Hr: (0 <= r')%hq
q': hq
Hq: (0 <= q')%hq
(r' + pr1 q - pr1 q)%hq = r'

  
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
r': hq
Hr: (0 <= r')%hq
q': hq
Hq: (0 <= q')%hq
(r' + pr1 q + - pr1 q)%hq = r'

  
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
r': hq
Hr: (0 <= r')%hq
q': hq
Hq: (0 <= q')%hq
(r' + (pr1 q + - pr1 q))%hq = r'

  
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
r': hq
Hr: (0 <= r')%hq
q': hq
Hq: (0 <= q')%hq
(r' + (- pr1 q + pr1 q))%hq = r'

  
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
r': hq
Hr: (0 <= r')%hq
q': hq
Hq: (0 <= q')%hq
(r' + 0)%hq = r'

  
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
r': hq
Hr: (0 <= r')%hq
q': hq
Hq: (0 <= q')%hq
r' = r'

  reflexivity.
Qed.


∏ q r : NonnegativeRationals, q + r - q = r


∏ q r : NonnegativeRationals, q + r - q = r

  
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
q + r - q = r

  
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
r + q - q = r

  now apply plusNonnegativeRationals_minus_r.
Qed.


∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals, x = y + z → z = x - y


∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals, x = y + z → z = x - y

  
y, z: NonnegativeRationals
z = y + z - y

  now rewrite plusNonnegativeRationals_minus_l.
Qed.

∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals, x = y + z → y = x - z


∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals, x = y + z → y = x - z

  
y, z: NonnegativeRationals
y = y + z - z

  now rewrite plusNonnegativeRationals_minus_r.
Qed.


∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, 0 - x = 0


∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, 0 - x = 0

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
0 - x = 0

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
0 <= x

  now apply isnonnegative_NonnegativeRationals.
Qed.

∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, x - 0 = x


∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, x - 0 = x

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
x - 0 = x

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
x - 0 + 0 = x

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
0 <= x

  now apply isnonnegative_NonnegativeRationals.
Qed.


∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals,
y <= x → x - y + z = x + z - y


∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals,
y <= x → x - y + z = x + z - y

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: y <= x
x - y + z = x + z - y

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: y <= x
y <= x + z
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: y <= x
Hxzy: y <= x + z
x - y + z = x + z - y

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: y <= x
y <= x + z
 
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: y <= x
y <= x
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: y <= x
x <= x + z

    
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: y <= x
y <= x
 exact Hxy. 
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: y <= x
x <= x + z

    apply plusNonnegativeRationals_le_r. 
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: y <= x
Hxzy: y <= x + z
x - y + z = x + z - y

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: y <= x
Hxzy: y <= x + z
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq
  (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x) Hxy) + z =
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals
  (pr1 (x + z)%NRat - pr1 y)%hq
  (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 (x + z)) Hxzy)

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
∏ (Hxy : y <= x) (Hxzy : y <= x + z),
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq
  (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x) Hxy) + z =
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals
  (pr1 (x + z)%NRat - pr1 y)%hq
  (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 (x + z)) Hxzy)

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: y <= x
Hxzy: y <= x + z
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq
  (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x) Hxy) + z =
Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals
  (pr1 (x + z)%NRat - pr1 y)%hq
  (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 (x + z)) Hxzy)

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: y <= x
Hxzy: y <= x + z
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals
     (pr1 x - pr1 y)%hq
     (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 x) Hxy) + z) =
pr1
  (Rationals_to_NonnegativeRationals
     (pr1 (x + z)%NRat - pr1 y)%hq
     (hq0leminus (pr1 y) (pr1 (x + z)) Hxzy))

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: y <= x
Hxzy: y <= x + z
(pr1 x - pr1 y + pr1 z)%hq =
(pr1 x + pr1 z - pr1 y)%hq

  now unfold hqminus ; rewrite !hqplusassoc, (hqpluscomm (pr1 z)).
Qed.

(** Order *)


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, x < y <-> 0 < y - x


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, x < y <-> 0 < y - x

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
x < y <-> 0 < y - x

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: x < y
0 < y - x
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: 0 < y - x
x < y

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: x < y
0 < y - x
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: x < y
0 + x < y - x + x

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: x < y
x < y
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: x < y
x <= y

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: x < y
x < y
 exact Hlt.
    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: x < y
x <= y
 now apply lt_leNonnegativeRationals, Hlt.
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: 0 < y - x
x < y
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
0 < y - x → x < y

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
0 <
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (pr1 y > pr1 x)%hq ⨿ (pr1 y <= pr1 x)%hq,
   hnnq_set)
  (λ H : (pr1 y > pr1 x)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 y - pr1 x)%hq
     (hq0leminus (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (hqlthtoleh (pr1 x) (pr1 y) H)))
  (λ _ : (pr1 y <= pr1 x)%hq, hnnq_zero)
  (hqgthorleh (pr1 y) (pr1 x)) → x < y

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
∏ c : (pr1 y > pr1 x)%hq ⨿ (pr1 y <= pr1 x)%hq,
0 <
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (pr1 y > pr1 x)%hq ⨿ (pr1 y <= pr1 x)%hq,
   hnnq_set)
  (λ H : (pr1 y > pr1 x)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 y - pr1 x)%hq
     (hq0leminus (pr1 x) (pr1 y)
        (hqlthtoleh (pr1 x) (pr1 y) H)))
  (λ _ : (pr1 y <= pr1 x)%hq, hnnq_zero) c → x < y

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H0: (pr1 y > pr1 x)%hq
Hlt: 0 <
coprod_rect (λ _ : (pr1 y > pr1 x)%hq ⨿ (pr1 y <= pr1 x)%hq, hnnq_set)
(λ H : (pr1 y > pr1 x)%hq,
hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 y - pr1 x)%hq
(hq0leminus (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (hqlthtoleh (pr1 x) (pr1 y) H)))
(λ _ : (pr1 y <= pr1 x)%hq, hnnq_zero) (inl H0)
x < y
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H0: (pr1 y <= pr1 x)%hq
Hlt: 0 <
coprod_rect (λ _ : (pr1 y > pr1 x)%hq ⨿ (pr1 y <= pr1 x)%hq, hnnq_set)
(λ H : (pr1 y > pr1 x)%hq,
hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 y - pr1 x)%hq
(hq0leminus (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (hqlthtoleh (pr1 x) (pr1 y) H)))
(λ _ : (pr1 y <= pr1 x)%hq, hnnq_zero) (inr H0)
x < y

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H0: (pr1 y > pr1 x)%hq
Hlt: 0 <
coprod_rect (λ _ : (pr1 y > pr1 x)%hq ⨿ (pr1 y <= pr1 x)%hq, hnnq_set)
(λ H : (pr1 y > pr1 x)%hq,
hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 y - pr1 x)%hq
(hq0leminus (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (hqlthtoleh (pr1 x) (pr1 y) H)))
(λ _ : (pr1 y <= pr1 x)%hq, hnnq_zero) (inl H0)
x < y
 exact H0.
    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
H0: (pr1 y <= pr1 x)%hq
Hlt: 0 <
coprod_rect (λ _ : (pr1 y > pr1 x)%hq ⨿ (pr1 y <= pr1 x)%hq, hnnq_set)
(λ H : (pr1 y > pr1 x)%hq,
hq_to_hnnq_set (pr1 y - pr1 x)%hq
(hq0leminus (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (hqlthtoleh (pr1 x) (pr1 y) H)))
(λ _ : (pr1 y <= pr1 x)%hq, hnnq_zero) (inr H0)
x < y
 now apply isirrefl_ltNonnegativeRationals in Hlt.
Qed.


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, x - y <= x


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, x - y <= x

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
x - y <= x

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
x - y + y <= x + y

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: y <= x
x - y + y <= x + y
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: ¬ (y <= x)
x - y + y <= x + y

Hle: y <= x
x - y + y <= x + y
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: y <= x
x <= x + y
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: y <= x
y <= x

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: y <= x
x <= x + y
 now apply plusNonnegativeRationals_le_r.
    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: y <= x
y <= x
 exact Hle.
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: ¬ (y <= x)
x - y + y <= x + y
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: ¬ (y <= x)
0 + y <= x + y
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: ¬ (y <= x)
x <= y

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: ¬ (y <= x)
0 + y <= x + y
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: ¬ (y <= x)
y <= x + y

      apply plusNonnegativeRationals_le_l.
    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: ¬ (y <= x)
x <= y
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: ¬ (y <= x)
x < y

      now apply notge_ltNonnegativeRationals.
Qed.

 exact Hxy.

Hxy: x <= y

k <= y
 now apply istrans_leNonnegativeRationals with (2 := Hxy).

Hxy: x <= y
Hkx: k <= x
k <= x
 exact Hkx.

Hxy: x <= y

x - k <= y - k

Hxy: x <= y

0 <= y - k
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: x <= y
Hkx: ¬ (k <= x)
x <= k

    
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: x <= y
Hkx: ¬ (k <= x)
0 <= y - k
 now apply isnonnegative_NonnegativeRationals.
    
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: x <= y
Hkx: ¬ (k <= x)
x <= k
 now apply lt_leNonnegativeRationals, notge_ltNonnegativeRationals.
Qed.

 now apply_pr2 (plusNonnegativeRationals_lecompat_r k).

z < y - x + z

Hky: y <= z
0 + z < y - x + z

      
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: x < y
Hxz: x < z
Hky: y <= z
0 < y - x

      now apply (pr1 (ispositive_minusNonnegativeRationals _ _)), Hxy.
    
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: x < y
Hxz: x < z
Hky: y <= z
x <= y
 now apply lt_leNonnegativeRationals, Hxy.
    
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: x < y
Hxz: x < z
Hky: y <= z
x <= z
 now apply lt_leNonnegativeRationals, Hxz.

Hxz: x < z
Hky: y <= z
y <= z
 exact Hky.
  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: x < y

z - y < z - x
 
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals

0 < z - x
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals

z <= y

    
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: x < y
Hxz: x < z

0 < z - x
 now apply (pr1 (ispositive_minusNonnegativeRationals _ _)), Hxz.
    
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hxy: x < y
Hxz: x < z
Hky: ¬ (y <= z)
z <= y
 now apply lt_leNonnegativeRationals, notge_ltNonnegativeRationals, Hky.
Qed.

∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals, z - y < z - x → x < y


∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals, z - y < z - x → x < y

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
H: z - y < z - x
x < y

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
H: z - y < z - x
¬ (y <= x)

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
H0: y <= x
z - y < z - x → ∅

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
H0: y <= x
¬ (z - y < z - x)

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
H0: y <= x
¬ (z - y < z - x)

  now apply minusNonnegativeRationals_lecompat_r, H0.
Qed.

(** *** Multiplication *)
(** Rewritings *)

Definition isassoc_multNonnegativeRationals:
  ∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals, x * y * z = x * (y * z) :=
  CommDivRig_isassoc_mult.
Definition islunit_oneNonnegativeRationals:
  ∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, 1 * x = x :=
  CommDivRig_islunit_one.
Definition isrunit_oneNonnegativeRationals:
  ∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, x * 1 = x :=
  CommDivRig_isrunit_one.
Definition iscomm_multNonnegativeRationals:
  ∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, x * y = y * x :=
  CommDivRig_iscomm_mult.
Definition isldistr_mult_plusNonnegativeRationals:
  ∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals, z * (x + y) = z * x + z * y :=
  CommDivRig_isldistr.
Definition isrdistr_mult_plusNonnegativeRationals:
  ∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals, (x + y) * z = x * z + y * z :=
  CommDivRig_isrdistr.
Definition islabsorb_zero_multNonnegativeRationals:
  ∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, 0 * x = 0 :=
  rigmult0x _.
Definition israbsorb_zero_multNonnegativeRationals:
  ∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, x * 0 = 0 :=
  rigmultx0 _.

(** Order *)


∏ k x y : NonnegativeRationals,
0 < k → x < y <-> k * x < k * y


∏ k x y : NonnegativeRationals,
0 < k → x < y <-> k * x < k * y

  
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hk: 0 < k
x < y <-> k * x < k * y

  
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hk: 0 < k
H: x < y
k * x < k * y
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hk: 0 < k
H: k * x < k * y
x < y

  
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hk: 0 < k
H: x < y
k * x < k * y
 
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hk: 0 < k
H: x < y
(pr1 k > 0)%hq
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hk: 0 < k
H: x < y
(pr1 x < pr1 y)%hq

    
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hk: 0 < k
H: x < y
(pr1 k > 0)%hq
 exact Hk.
    
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hk: 0 < k
H: x < y
(pr1 x < pr1 y)%hq
 exact H.
  
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hk: 0 < k
H: k * x < k * y
x < y
 
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hk: 0 < k
H: k * x < k * y
(pr1 k > 0)%hq
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hk: 0 < k
H: k * x < k * y
(pr1 k * pr1 x < pr1 k * pr1 y)%hq

    
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hk: 0 < k
H: k * x < k * y
(pr1 k > 0)%hq
 exact Hk.
    
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hk: 0 < k
H: k * x < k * y
(pr1 k * pr1 x < pr1 k * pr1 y)%hq
 exact H.
Qed.

0 <= 0

    now apply isrefl_leNonnegativeRationals.

Hle: x <= y
Hk0: 0 < k
k * x <= k * y

Hle: x <= y
Hk0: 0 < k

    exact Hk0.
Qed.

H: k * x = k * y
x = y

H: k * x = k * y
1 * x = y

Hk0: 0 < k
H: k * x = k * y
(1%dr : NonnegativeRationals) * x = y

k != 0

H: k * x = k * y
Hk: k != 0
(1%dr : NonnegativeRationals) * x = y

Hk0: 0 < k
H: k * x = k * y
k != 0
 apply gtNonnegativeRationals_noteq, Hk0. 
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hk0: 0 < k
H: k * x = k * y
Hk: k != 0
(1%dr : NonnegativeRationals) * x = y

H: k * x = k * y
Hk: k != 0
(/ (k,, Hk) * k)%dr * x = y

H: k * x = k * y
Hk: k != 0
(/ (k,, Hk))%dr * (k * x) = y

  
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hk0: 0 < k
H: k * x = k * y
Hk: k != 0
(/ (k,, Hk))%dr * (k * y) = y

  
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hk0: 0 < k
H: k * x = k * y
Hk: k != 0
(/ (k,, Hk))%dr * k * y = y

  
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hk0: 0 < k
H: k * x = k * y
Hk: k != 0
(/ (k,, Hk) * k)%dr * y = y

  
k, x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hk0: 0 < k
H: k * x = k * y
Hk: k != 0
1%dr * y = y

  now apply islunit_oneNonnegativeRationals.
Qed.

0 < x

Hy: 0 < y

Hy: 0 < y
0 < x
 exact Hx.
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: 0 < x
Hy: 0 < y

 exact Hy.
Qed.

 exact Hy0.

x < x'
 exact Hx.

 now apply multNonnegativeRationals_lecompat_l, Hy.

∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals,
z * (x - y) = z * x - z * y


∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals,
z * (x - y) = z * x - z * y

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
z * (x - y) = z * x - z * y

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
z * (x - y) = z * x - z * y
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: ¬ (x <= y)
z * (x - y) = z * x - z * y

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
z * (x - y) = z * x - z * y
 
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
z * 0 = 0
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
z * x <= z * y
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
x <= y

    
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
z * 0 = 0
 now apply israbsorb_zero_multNonnegativeRationals.
    
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
z * x <= z * y
 now apply multNonnegativeRationals_lecompat_l, Hle.
    
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
x <= y
 exact Hle.
  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: ¬ (x <= y)
z * (x - y) = z * x - z * y
 
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: y <= x
z * (x - y) = z * x - z * y

    
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: y <= x
z * (x - y) + z * y = z * x - z * y + z * y

    
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: y <= x
z * (x - y + y) = z * x - z * y + z * y

    
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: y <= x
z * x = z * x
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: y <= x
z * y <= z * x
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: y <= x
y <= x

    
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: y <= x
z * x = z * x
 reflexivity.
    
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: y <= x
z * y <= z * x
 now apply multNonnegativeRationals_lecompat_l, Hlt.
    
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: y <= x
y <= x
 exact Hlt.
Qed.

∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals,
(x - y) * z = x * z - y * z


∏ x y z : NonnegativeRationals,
(x - y) * z = x * z - y * z

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
(x - y) * z = x * z - y * z

  
x, y, z: NonnegativeRationals
z * (x - y) = z * x - z * y

  now apply isldistr_mult_minusNonnegativeRationals.
Qed.

(** *** Multiplicative Inverse *)
(** Rewritings *)


∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, 0 < x → / x * x = 1


∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, 0 < x → / x * x = 1

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx0: 0 < x
/ x * x = 1

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx0: 0 < x
x != 0
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx0: 0 < x
Hx: x != 0
/ x * x = 1

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx0: 0 < x
x != 0
 apply gtNonnegativeRationals_noteq, Hx0. 
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx0: 0 < x
Hx: x != 0
/ x * x = 1

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: x != 0
/ x * x = 1

  
∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, x != 0 → / x * x = 1

  apply @CommDivRig_islinv.
Qed.

∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, 0 < x → x * / x = 1


∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, 0 < x → x * / x = 1

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
0 < x → x * / x = 1

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
0 < x → / x * x = 1

  now apply islinv_NonnegativeRationals.
Qed.


/ 0 = 0


/ 0 = 0

  
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (0 < 0)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = 0%hq), hnnq_set)
  (λ Hx0 : (0 < 0)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (/ 0)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ 0)%hq (hqinv_gt0 0%hq Hx0)))
  (λ _ : 0%hq = 0%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set 0%hq (isreflhqleh 0%hq))
  (hqlehchoice 0%hq 0%hq (isreflhqleh 0%hq)) =
hq_to_hnnq_set 0%hq (isreflhqleh 0%hq)

  
H0: (0 < 0)%hq
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (0 < 0)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = 0%hq), hnnq_set)
  (λ Hx0 : (0 < 0)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (/ 0)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ 0)%hq (hqinv_gt0 0%hq Hx0)))
  (λ _ : 0%hq = 0%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set 0%hq (isreflhqleh 0%hq)) (inl H0) =
hq_to_hnnq_set 0%hq (isreflhqleh 0%hq)
H0: 0%hq = 0%hq
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (0 < 0)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = 0%hq), hnnq_set)
  (λ Hx0 : (0 < 0)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (/ 0)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ 0)%hq (hqinv_gt0 0%hq Hx0)))
  (λ _ : 0%hq = 0%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set 0%hq (isreflhqleh 0%hq)) (inr H0) =
hq_to_hnnq_set 0%hq (isreflhqleh 0%hq)

  
H0: (0 < 0)%hq
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (0 < 0)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = 0%hq), hnnq_set)
  (λ Hx0 : (0 < 0)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (/ 0)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ 0)%hq (hqinv_gt0 0%hq Hx0)))
  (λ _ : 0%hq = 0%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set 0%hq (isreflhqleh 0%hq)) (inl H0) =
hq_to_hnnq_set 0%hq (isreflhqleh 0%hq)
 now apply fromempty ; apply isirreflhqlth in H0.
  
H0: 0%hq = 0%hq
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (0 < 0)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = 0%hq), hnnq_set)
  (λ Hx0 : (0 < 0)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (/ 0)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ 0)%hq (hqinv_gt0 0%hq Hx0)))
  (λ _ : 0%hq = 0%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set 0%hq (isreflhqleh 0%hq)) (inr H0) =
hq_to_hnnq_set 0%hq (isreflhqleh 0%hq)
 reflexivity.
Qed.


∏ x : NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet,
0 < x <-> 0 < / x


∏ x : NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet,
0 < x <-> 0 < / x

  
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
0 < x <-> 0 < / x

  
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x
0 < / x
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < / x
0 < x

  
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x
0 < / x
 
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x
0 < x
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x
x * 0 < x * / x

    
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x
0 < x
 exact Hx.
    
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x
x * 0 < x * / x

(** *** Division *)
(** Rewritings *)


∏ q r : NonnegativeRationals, 0 < r → r * (q / r) = q


∏ q r : NonnegativeRationals, 0 < r → r * (q / r) = q

  
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
Hr0: 0 < r
r * (q / r) = q

  
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
Hr0: 0 < r
r * (q * / r) = q

  
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
Hr0: 0 < r
q * (/ r * r) = q

  
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
Hr0: 0 < r
q * 1 = q
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
Hr0: 0 < r
0 < r

  
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
Hr0: 0 < r
q * 1 = q
 now apply isrunit_oneNonnegativeRationals.
  
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
Hr0: 0 < r
0 < r
 exact Hr0.
Qed.


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
0 < y → / x - / y = (y - x) / (x * y)


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
0 < y → / x - / y = (y - x) / (x * y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
/ x - / y = (y - x) / (x * y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: x = 0
/ x - / y = (y - x) / (x * y)
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: 0 < x
/ x - / y = (y - x) / (x * y)

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: x = 0
/ x - / y = (y - x) / (x * y)
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: x = 0
/ x - / y = (y - x) * / (x * y)

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: x = 0
0 = 0

    reflexivity.
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: 0 < x
/ x - / y = (y - x) / (x * y)
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: 0 < x
0 < x * y
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: 0 < x
x * y * (/ x - / y) = x * y * ((y - x) / (x * y))

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: 0 < x
0 < x * y
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: 0 < x
0 < x

      exact Hx0.
    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: 0 < x
x * y * (/ x - / y) = x * y * ((y - x) / (x * y))
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: 0 < x
x * y * (/ x - / y) = y - x
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: 0 < x
0 < x * y

      
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: 0 < x
x * y * (/ x - / y) = y - x
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: 0 < x
0 < x

      
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: 0 < x
x * y * (/ x - / y) = y - x
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: 0 < x
x * y * / x - x * y * / y = y - x

        
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: 0 < x
y - x * y * / y = y - x
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: 0 < x
0 < x

        
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: 0 < x
y - x * y * / y = y - x

        
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: 0 < x
y - x = y - x
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: 0 < x
0 < y

        
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: 0 < x
y - x = y - x

        reflexivity.
      
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hy0: 0 < y
Hx0: 0 < x
0 < x
 exact Hx0.
Qed.

(** Order *)


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet,
0 < x → 0 < y → 0 < x / y


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet,
0 < x → 0 < y → 0 < x / y

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x
Hy: 0 < y
0 < x / y

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x
Hy: 0 < y
0 < x
x, y: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x
Hy: 0 < y
0 < / y

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x
Hy: 0 < y
0 < x
 exact Hx.
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x
Hy: 0 < y
0 < / y
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x
Hy: 0 < y
0 < y

    exact Hy.
Qed.


∏ q r : NonnegativeRationals, q <= r → q / r <= 1

q, r: NonnegativeRationals

q / r <= 1

Hr0: r = 0
q / r <= 1

Hrq: q <= r
Hr0: 0 < r
q / r <= 1

Hrq: q <= r
Hr0: r = 0
q / r <= 1

Hr0: r = 0
q * / r <= 1

Hr0: r = 0
q * 0 <= 1

    
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
Hrq: q <= r
Hr0: r = 0
0 <= 1

    now apply isnonnegative_NonnegativeRationals.
  
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
Hrq: q <= r
Hr0: 0 < r
q / r <= 1
 
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
Hrq: q <= r
Hr0: 0 < r
0 < r

Hr0: 0 < r
q / r * r <= 1 * r

Hrq: q <= r

0 < r
 exact Hr0.

Hrq: q <= r
Hr0: 0 < r
q / r * r <= 1 * r
 
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
Hrq: q <= r
Hr0: 0 < r
q * / r * r <= 1 * r

Hrq: q <= r
Hr0: 0 < r
q * 1 <= 1 * r
q, r: NonnegativeRationals

Hr0: 0 < r
0 < r
