Hrq: q <= r
Hr0: 0 < r
q * 1 <= 1 * r
 
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
Hrq: q <= r
Hr0: 0 < r
q <= r

        exact Hrq.
      
q, r: NonnegativeRationals
Hrq: q <= r
Hr0: 0 < r
0 < r
 exact Hr0.
Qed.

(** ** NQhalf *)


∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, x = x / 2 + x / 2


∏ x : NonnegativeRationals, x = x / 2 + x / 2

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
x = x / 2 + x / 2

  
x: NonnegativeRationals
pr1 x,, pr2 x =
(pr1 x,, pr2 x) / 2 + (pr1 x,, pr2 x) / 2

  
x: hq
Hx: (0 <= x)%hq
x,, Hx = (x,, Hx) / 2 + (x,, Hx) / 2

  
x: hq
Hx: (0 <= x)%hq
x,, Hx =
(x,, Hx) *
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (0 < 2)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = 2%hq), hnnq_set)
  (λ Hx0 : (0 < 2)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (/ 2)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ 2)%hq (hqinv_gt0 2%hq Hx0)))
  (λ _ : 0%hq = 2%hq,
   2%hq,, hqlthtoleh 0%hq 2%hq hq2_gt0)
  (hqlehchoice 0%hq 2%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq 2%hq hq2_gt0)) +
(x,, Hx) *
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (0 < 2)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = 2%hq), hnnq_set)
  (λ Hx0 : (0 < 2)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (/ 2)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ 2)%hq (hqinv_gt0 2%hq Hx0)))
  (λ _ : 0%hq = 2%hq,
   2%hq,, hqlthtoleh 0%hq 2%hq hq2_gt0)
  (hqlehchoice 0%hq 2%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq 2%hq hq2_gt0))

  
x: hq
Hx: (0 <= x)%hq
H2: (0 < 2)%hq
x,, Hx =
(x,, Hx) *
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (0 < 2)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = 2%hq), hnnq_set)
  (λ Hx0 : (0 < 2)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (/ 2)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ 2)%hq (hqinv_gt0 2%hq Hx0)))
  (λ _ : 0%hq = 2%hq,
   2%hq,, hqlthtoleh 0%hq 2%hq hq2_gt0) (inl H2) +
(x,, Hx) *
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (0 < 2)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = 2%hq), hnnq_set)
  (λ Hx0 : (0 < 2)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (/ 2)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ 2)%hq (hqinv_gt0 2%hq Hx0)))
  (λ _ : 0%hq = 2%hq,
   2%hq,, hqlthtoleh 0%hq 2%hq hq2_gt0) (inl H2)
x: hq
Hx: (0 <= x)%hq
H2: 0%hq = 2%hq
x,, Hx =
(x,, Hx) *
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (0 < 2)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = 2%hq), hnnq_set)
  (λ Hx0 : (0 < 2)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (/ 2)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ 2)%hq (hqinv_gt0 2%hq Hx0)))
  (λ _ : 0%hq = 2%hq,
   2%hq,, hqlthtoleh 0%hq 2%hq hq2_gt0) (inr H2) +
(x,, Hx) *
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (0 < 2)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = 2%hq), hnnq_set)
  (λ Hx0 : (0 < 2)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (/ 2)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ 2)%hq (hqinv_gt0 2%hq Hx0)))
  (λ _ : 0%hq = 2%hq,
   2%hq,, hqlthtoleh 0%hq 2%hq hq2_gt0) (inr H2)

  
x: hq
Hx: (0 <= x)%hq
H2: (0 < 2)%hq
x,, Hx =
(x,, Hx) *
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (0 < 2)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = 2%hq), hnnq_set)
  (λ Hx0 : (0 < 2)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (/ 2)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ 2)%hq (hqinv_gt0 2%hq Hx0)))
  (λ _ : 0%hq = 2%hq,
   2%hq,, hqlthtoleh 0%hq 2%hq hq2_gt0) (inl H2) +
(x,, Hx) *
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (0 < 2)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = 2%hq), hnnq_set)
  (λ Hx0 : (0 < 2)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (/ 2)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ 2)%hq (hqinv_gt0 2%hq Hx0)))
  (λ _ : 0%hq = 2%hq,
   2%hq,, hqlthtoleh 0%hq 2%hq hq2_gt0) (inl H2)
 
x: hq
Hx: (0 <= x)%hq
H2: (0 < 2)%hq
x = (x * / 2 + x * / 2)%hq

    
x: hq
Hx: (0 <= x)%hq
H2: (0 < 2)%hq
x = ((x + x) * / 2)%hq

    apply hqplusdiv2.
  
x: hq
Hx: (0 <= x)%hq
H2: 0%hq = 2%hq
x,, Hx =
(x,, Hx) *
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (0 < 2)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = 2%hq), hnnq_set)
  (λ Hx0 : (0 < 2)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (/ 2)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ 2)%hq (hqinv_gt0 2%hq Hx0)))
  (λ _ : 0%hq = 2%hq,
   2%hq,, hqlthtoleh 0%hq 2%hq hq2_gt0) (inr H2) +
(x,, Hx) *
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (0 < 2)%hq ⨿ (0%hq = 2%hq), hnnq_set)
  (λ Hx0 : (0 < 2)%hq,
   hq_to_hnnq_set (/ 2)%hq
     (hqlthtoleh 0%hq (/ 2)%hq (hqinv_gt0 2%hq Hx0)))
  (λ _ : 0%hq = 2%hq,
   2%hq,, hqlthtoleh 0%hq 2%hq hq2_gt0) (inr H2)
 
x: hq
Hx: (0 <= x)%hq
H2: 0%hq = 2%hq
(2 > 0)%hq → ∅

    
x: hq
Hx: (0 <= x)%hq
H2: 0%hq = 2%hq
(2 > 2)%hq → ∅

    now apply (isirreflhqlth 2%hq).
Qed.


∏ x : NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet,
0 < x <-> 0 < x / 2

x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet

x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet

0 < x / 2
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet

0 < x

  
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet

0 < x / 2

0 < 2
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x
0 * 2 < x / 2 * 2

    
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x
0 < 2
 now apply ispositive_twoNonnegativeRationals.
    
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x
0 * 2 < x / 2 * 2
 
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet

0 < x * (/ 2 * 2)

0 < 2

      
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet

0 < x * 1
 now rewrite isrunit_oneNonnegativeRationals.
      
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x
0 < 2
 now apply ispositive_twoNonnegativeRationals.
  
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x / 2
0 < x
 
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x / 2
0 < / 2
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x / 2
0 * / 2 < x * / 2

    
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x / 2
0 < / 2
 
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x / 2
0 < 2

      now apply ispositive_twoNonnegativeRationals.
    
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x / 2
0 * / 2 < x * / 2
 
x: NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet
Hx: 0 < x / 2
0 < x * / 2

      exact Hx.
Qed.

(** ** NQmax *)


binop NonnegativeRationals


binop NonnegativeRationals

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
NonnegativeRationals

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
NonnegativeRationals
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
NonnegativeRationals

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
NonnegativeRationals
 exact y.
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
NonnegativeRationals
 exact x.
Defined.

∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
NQmax x y = 0 → x = 0 × y = 0


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals,
NQmax x y = 0 → x = 0 × y = 0

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
NQmax x y = 0 → x = 0 × y = 0

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
sumofmaps (λ _ : x <= y, y) (λ _ : ¬ (x <= y), x)
  (isdecrel_leNonnegativeRationals x y) = 0
→ x = 0 × y = 0

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
∏ c : (x <= y) ⨿ ¬ (x <= y),
sumofmaps (λ _ : x <= y, y) (λ _ : ¬ (x <= y), x) c =
0 → x = 0 × y = 0

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
H: y = 0
x = 0
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
H: y = 0
y = 0
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: ¬ (x <= y)
H: x = 0
x = 0
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: ¬ (x <= y)
H: x = 0
y = 0

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
H: y = 0
x = 0
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
H: y = 0
x <= 0

    
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
H: y = 0
y <= 0

    now rewrite H ; apply isrefl_leNonnegativeRationals.
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
H: y = 0
y = 0
 exact H.
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: ¬ (x <= y)
H: x = 0
x = 0
 exact H.
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: ¬ (x <= y)
H: x = 0
y = 0
 
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hlt: ¬ (x <= y)
H: x = 0
y <= x

    now apply lt_leNonnegativeRationals, notge_ltNonnegativeRationals.
Qed.

∏ (P : NonnegativeRationals → UU)
(x y : NonnegativeRationals),
P x → P y → P (NQmax x y)


∏ (P : NonnegativeRationals → UU)
(x y : NonnegativeRationals),
P x → P y → P (NQmax x y)

  
P: NonnegativeRationals → UU
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: P x
Hy: P y
P (NQmax x y)

  
P: NonnegativeRationals → UU
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: P x
Hy: P y
P
  (sumofmaps (λ _ : x <= y, y) (λ _ : ¬ (x <= y), x)
     (isdecrel_leNonnegativeRationals x y))

  
P: NonnegativeRationals → UU
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: P x
Hy: P y
∏ c : (x <= y) ⨿ ¬ (x <= y),
P
  (sumofmaps (λ _ : x <= y, y) (λ _ : ¬ (x <= y), x) c)

  now apply coprod_rect.
Qed.

∏ (P : NonnegativeRationals → UU)
(x y : NonnegativeRationals),
(y <= x → P x) → (x <= y → P y) → P (NQmax x y)


∏ (P : NonnegativeRationals → UU)
(x y : NonnegativeRationals),
(y <= x → P x) → (x <= y → P y) → P (NQmax x y)

  
P: NonnegativeRationals → UU
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: y <= x → P x
Hy: x <= y → P y
P (NQmax x y)

  
P: NonnegativeRationals → UU
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: y <= x → P x
Hy: x <= y → P y
P
  (sumofmaps (λ _ : x <= y, y) (λ _ : ¬ (x <= y), x)
     (isdecrel_leNonnegativeRationals x y))

  
P: NonnegativeRationals → UU
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: y <= x → P x
Hy: x <= y → P y
∏ c : (x <= y) ⨿ ¬ (x <= y),
P
  (sumofmaps (λ _ : x <= y, y) (λ _ : ¬ (x <= y), x) c)

  
P: NonnegativeRationals → UU
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: y <= x → P x
Hy: x <= y → P y
Hle: x <= y
P
  (sumofmaps (λ _ : x <= y, y) (λ _ : ¬ (x <= y), x)
     (inl Hle))
P: NonnegativeRationals → UU
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: y <= x → P x
Hy: x <= y → P y
Hlt: ¬ (x <= y)
P
  (sumofmaps (λ _ : x <= y, y) (λ _ : ¬ (x <= y), x)
     (inr Hlt))

  
P: NonnegativeRationals → UU
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: y <= x → P x
Hy: x <= y → P y
Hle: x <= y
P
  (sumofmaps (λ _ : x <= y, y) (λ _ : ¬ (x <= y), x)
     (inl Hle))
 now apply Hy.
  
P: NonnegativeRationals → UU
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: y <= x → P x
Hy: x <= y → P y
Hlt: ¬ (x <= y)
P
  (sumofmaps (λ _ : x <= y, y) (λ _ : ¬ (x <= y), x)
     (inr Hlt))
 
P: NonnegativeRationals → UU
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hx: y <= x → P x
Hy: x <= y → P y
Hlt: ¬ (x <= y)
y <= x

    now apply lt_leNonnegativeRationals, notge_ltNonnegativeRationals.
Qed.

∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, NQmax x y = NQmax y x


∏ x y : NonnegativeRationals, NQmax x y = NQmax y x

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
NQmax x y = NQmax y x

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: y <= x
Hle': x <= y
x = y
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle, Hle': y <= x
x = x
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle, Hle': x <= y
y = y
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
Hle': y <= x
y = x

  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: y <= x
Hle': x <= y
x = y
 now apply isantisymm_leNonnegativeRationals.
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle, Hle': y <= x
x = x
 reflexivity.
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle, Hle': x <= y
y = y
 reflexivity.
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
Hle': y <= x
y = x
 now apply isantisymm_leNonnegativeRationals.
Qed.

x <= NQmax x y

Hle: x <= y
x <= y

Hle: y <= x
x <= x
 apply isrefl_leNonnegativeRationals.
  
x, y: NonnegativeRationals
Hle: x <= y
x <= y
 exact Hle.
Qed.

x, y: NonnegativeRationals

 exact x.

 exact y.
Defined.

(** ** intpart *)


nat_to_NonnegativeRationals 0 = 0


nat_to_NonnegativeRationals 0 = 0

  
pr1 (nat_to_NonnegativeRationals 0) = pr1 0

  reflexivity.
Qed.

∏ n : nat,
nat_to_NonnegativeRationals (S n) =
nat_to_NonnegativeRationals n + 1


∏ n : nat,
nat_to_NonnegativeRationals (S n) =
nat_to_NonnegativeRationals n + 1

  
n: nat
nat_to_NonnegativeRationals (S n) =
nat_to_NonnegativeRationals n + 1

  
n: nat
pr1 (nat_to_NonnegativeRationals (S n)) =
pr1 (nat_to_NonnegativeRationals n + 1)

  
n: nat
hztohq (nattohz (S n)) = (hztohq (nattohz n) + 1)%hq

  
n: nat
(hztohq 1%hz + hztohq (nattohz n))%hq =
(hztohq (nattohz n) + 1)%hq

  apply hqpluscomm.
Qed.


isarchrig gtNonnegativeRationals


isarchrig gtNonnegativeRationals

  
H:= isarchhq: isarchfld hqgth
isarchrig gtNonnegativeRationals

  
H: isarchring hqgth
isarchrig gtNonnegativeRationals

isbinophrel hqgth

isringmultgt hq hqgth

isarchrig gtNonnegativeRationals

isbinophrel hqgth

∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n

isarchrig gtNonnegativeRationals

∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n

pr1 (nattorig 0) = nattorig 0

n: nat
IHn: pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
pr1 (nattorig (S n)) = nattorig (S n)

pr1 (nattorig 0) = nattorig 0

n: nat

pr1 (nattorig (S n)) = nattorig (S n)

n: nat

pr1 (1%rig + nattorig n)%ring =
(1%rig + pr1 (nattorig n))%ring

          reflexivity. 
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
isarchrig gtNonnegativeRationals

X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
∏ y1 y2 : pr1 NonnegativeRationals,
gtNonnegativeRationals y1 y2
→ ∃ n : nat,
  gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig n * y1)%ring
    (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
∏ x : pr1 NonnegativeRationals,
∃ n : nat, gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig n) x
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
∏ x : pr1 NonnegativeRationals,
∃ n : nat,
gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig

      
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
∏ y1 y2 : pr1 NonnegativeRationals,
gtNonnegativeRationals y1 y2
→ ∃ n : nat,
  gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig n * y1)%ring
    (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring
 
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
y1, y2: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
Hy: gtNonnegativeRationals y1 y2
∃ n : nat,
gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig n * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring

        
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
y1, y2: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
Hy: gtNonnegativeRationals y1 y2
(∃ n : nat,
 ((nattorig n * pr1 y1)%ring >
  (1%rig + nattorig n * pr1 y2)%ring)%hq)
→ ∃ n : nat,
  gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig n * y1)%ring
    (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring

        
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
y1, y2: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
Hy: gtNonnegativeRationals y1 y2
(∑ n : nat,
 ((nattorig n * pr1 y1)%ring >
  (1%rig + nattorig n * pr1 y2)%ring)%hq)
→ ∑ n : nat,
  gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig n * y1)%ring
    (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring

        
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
y1, y2: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
Hy: gtNonnegativeRationals y1 y2
n: ∑ n : nat,
((nattorig n * pr1 y1)%ring >
 (1%rig + nattorig n * pr1 y2)%ring)%hq
∑ n : nat,
gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig n * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig n * y2)%ring

        
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
y1, y2: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
Hy: gtNonnegativeRationals y1 y2
n: ∑ n : nat,
((nattorig n * pr1 y1)%ring >
 (1%rig + nattorig n * pr1 y2)%ring)%hq
gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig (pr1 n) * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig (pr1 n) * y2)%ring

        
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
y1, y2: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
Hy: gtNonnegativeRationals y1 y2
n: ∑ n : nat,
((nattorig n * pr1 y1)%ring >
 (1%rig + nattorig n * pr1 y2)%ring)%hq
Hn: ((nattorig (pr1 n) * pr1 y1)%ring >
 (1%rig + nattorig (pr1 n) * pr1 y2)%ring)%hq
gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig (pr1 n) * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig (pr1 n) * y2)%ring

        
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
y1, y2: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
Hy: gtNonnegativeRationals y1 y2
n: ∑ n : nat,
((nattorig n * pr1 y1)%ring >
 (1%rig + nattorig n * pr1 y2)%ring)%hq
Hn: ((pr1 (nattorig (pr1 n)) * pr1 y1)%ring >
 (1%rig + pr1 (nattorig (pr1 n)) * pr1 y2)%ring)%hq
gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig (pr1 n) * y1)%ring
  (1%rig + nattorig (pr1 n) * y2)%ring

        exact Hn.
      
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
∏ x : pr1 NonnegativeRationals,
∃ n : nat, gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig n) x
 
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
x: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
∃ n : nat, gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig n) x

        
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
x: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
(∃ n : nat, (nattorig n > pr1 x)%hq)
→ ∃ n : nat, gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig n) x

        
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
x: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
(∑ n : nat, (nattorig n > pr1 x)%hq)
→ ∑ n : nat, gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig n) x

        
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
x: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
n: ∑ n : nat, (nattorig n > pr1 x)%hq
∑ n : nat, gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig n) x

        
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
x: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
n: ∑ n : nat, (nattorig n > pr1 x)%hq
gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig (pr1 n)) x

        
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
x: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
n: ∑ n : nat, (nattorig n > pr1 x)%hq
Hn: (nattorig (pr1 n) > pr1 x)%hq
gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig (pr1 n)) x

        
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
x: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
n: ∑ n : nat, (nattorig n > pr1 x)%hq
Hn: (pr1 (nattorig (pr1 n)) > pr1 x)%hq
gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig (pr1 n)) x

        exact Hn.
      
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
∏ x : pr1 NonnegativeRationals,
∃ n : nat,
gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig
 
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
x: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
∃ n : nat,
gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig

        
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
x: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
(∃ n : nat, ((nattorig n + pr1 x)%ring > 0%rig)%hq)
→ ∃ n : nat,
  gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig

        
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
x: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
(∑ n : nat, ((nattorig n + pr1 x)%ring > 0%rig)%hq)
→ ∑ n : nat,
  gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig

        
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
x: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
n: ∑ n : nat, ((nattorig n + pr1 x)%ring > 0%rig)%hq
∑ n : nat,
gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig n + x)%ring 0%rig

        
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
x: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
n: ∑ n : nat, ((nattorig n + pr1 x)%ring > 0%rig)%hq
gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig (pr1 n) + x)%ring
  0%rig

        
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
x: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
n: ∑ n : nat, ((nattorig n + pr1 x)%ring > 0%rig)%hq
Hn: ((nattorig (pr1 n) + pr1 x)%ring > 0%rig)%hq
gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig (pr1 n) + x)%ring
  0%rig

        
H: isarchrig hqgth
X: ∏ n : nat, pr1 (nattorig n) = nattorig n
x: pr1 NonnegativeRationals
n: ∑ n : nat, ((nattorig n + pr1 x)%ring > 0%rig)%hq
Hn: ((pr1 (nattorig (pr1 n)) + pr1 x)%ring > 0%rig)%hq
gtNonnegativeRationals (nattorig (pr1 n) + x)%ring
  0%rig

        exact Hn.
    
H: isarchring hqgth
isbinophrel hqgth
 exact isringaddhzgth.
  
H:= isarchhq: isarchfld hqgth
isbinophrel hqgth
 exact isringaddhzgth.
  
H:= isarchhq: isarchfld hqgth
isringmultgt hq hqgth
 exact isringmulthqgth.
  
H:= isarchhq: isarchfld hqgth
isirrefl hqgth
 exact isirreflhqgth.
Qed.

Close Scope NRat_scope.

(** ** Opacify *)

Global Opaque NonnegativeRationals NonnegativeRationals_EffectivelyOrderedSet.
